96
 Przesłaliśmy Twój kwartalny raport podatkowy chińskiemu urzędowi skarbowemu. Możesz teraz pobrać raport do wglądu.
 Dzień dobry,
 zgodnie z zasadami dotyczącymi sklepów internetowych wydanymi przez Radę Państwa Chin (dekret nr 810) jesteśmy zobowiązani do przekazywania informacji o sprzedawcach z siedzibą w Chinach tamtejszemu organowi podatkowemu w cyklach kwartalnych.
 Przesłaliśmy Twój kwartalny raport podatkowy za okres od października do grudnia 2025 r., który zawiera Twoje dane identyfikacyjne, liczbę transakcji, przychody oraz prowizje i opłaty za usługi.
 Pobierz swój kwartalny raport (link aktywny przez siedem dni)
Raport jest przeznaczony wyłącznie do wglądu, nie jest wymagane żadne działanie.
 Na podstawie Twojej opinii udostępniliśmy też bardziej szczegółowy raport na poziomie zamówienia, który przedstawia informacje kwartalne z podziałem na transakcje.
 Pobierz raport na poziomie zamówienia (link aktywny przez siedem dni)
Uwaga: mogą wystąpić różnice między danymi w tych raportach a raportem o płatnościach i raportem Amazon o transakcjach podlegających VAT. Każdy raport korzysta z odrębnej metodologii i służy do innego celu.
 Będziemy Ci nadal przekazywać kwartalne

Félicitations, Xiangyuexin ! Votre paiement est en cours et arrivera sous trois à cinq jours.
Le 03/26/26 15:26 CET, nous avons effectué un virement d’un montant de €
 226.21 sur le compte lié à votre méthode de paiement (compte bancaire se terminant par 944).
 Si le montant est inférieur au montant auquel vous vous attendiez, voici quelques questions à vous poser :
 Disposez-vous d’un solde de fonds non disponibles ? Amazon peut réserver des fonds afin de couvrir des retours, des réclamations ou des rétrofacturations potentiels des acheteurs. Si tel est le cas, le solde de fin de période de votre rapport sur les paiements affichera le solde des fonds non disponibles réservé.
 Vos ventes couvraient-elles l’ensemble des frais et des retours pour cette période de règlements ? Le montant du paiement reflète votre activité commerciale, les frais de vente et les frais relatifs aux promotions et aux services.  Gentile ONLYFUN IT,
 Alcune delle tue offerte sono state disattivate a causa della mancanza di alcuni requisiti di conformità obbligatori per i tuoi prodotti. Rivedi i dettagli e i passi successivi riportati di seguito. Puoi visualizzare le offerte interessate in fondo a questa e-mail.
 Ciò a cosa è dovuto?
 Abbiamo intrapreso questo provvedimento in quanto i tuoi prodotti non dispongono delle informazioni obbligatorie sulla conformità. Consulta la pagina di aiuto Sicurezza e conformità dei prodotti per informazioni sulle leggi, le normative e le politiche di Amazon applicabili. Questa decisione è stata presa sulla base dei risultati di un'analisi effettuata in parte tramite revisione umana e in parte per mezzo di sistemi automatizzati.
 La tabella alla fine di questa e-mail contiene i requisiti di conformità specifici per i prodotti.
 Come faccio a riattivare le mie offerte?
 Per fornire le informazioni di conformità richieste, vai alla pagina Stato dell'account per individuare le richieste di conformità dei prodotti:
-
 Se disponi della documentazione richiesta, segui le istruzioni per inviare i d

 Sommige van je productvermeldingen zijn gedeactiveerd omdat er verplichte nalevingsvereisten voor je producten ontbreken. Bekijk de gegevens en de stappen hieronder. De betreffende productvermeldingen worden aan het einde van deze e-mail weergegeven.
 Waarom gebeurt dit?

Raadpleeg onze hulp-pagina Productveiligheid en -conformiteit voor informatie over de toepasselijke wet- en regelgeving en het Amazon-beleid. We hebben gebruikgemaakt van een combinatie van geautomatiseerde middelen en deskundige menselijke beoordeling om dit probleem te identificeren en deze beslissing te nemen.

-

 Tentative de versement
Félicitations, Weihai EU ! Votre paiement est en cours et arrivera sous trois à cinq jours.
Le 03/25/26 15:00 CET, nous avons effectué un virement d’un montant de €
 41.37 sur le compte lié à votre méthode de paiement (compte bancaire se terminant par 229).
 Si le montant est inférieur au montant auquel vous vous attendiez, voici quelques questions à vous poser :
 Disposez-vous d’un solde de fonds non disponibles ? Amazon peut réserver des fonds afin de couvrir des retours, des réclamations ou des rétrofacturations potentiels des acheteurs. Si tel est le cas, le solde de fin de période de votre rapport sur les paiements affichera le solde des fonds non disponibles réservé.
 Vos ventes couvraient-elles l’ensemble des frais et des retours pour cette période de règlements ? Le montant du paiement reflète votre activité commerciale, les frais de vente et les frais relatifs aux promotions et aux services. Nous vous recommandons de consulter votre rapport sur les paiements sous l’onglet Rapports de Seller Central pour comprendre votre solde de fin de pér

Pagamento elaborato con successo
时间分组：last7 邮箱：account_2 发件人：Amazon Services <donotreply@amazon.com> 日期：Wed, 25 Mar 2026 13:20:54 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:01:35
展开查看邮件预览 
96
This title will display on mobile devices
 Congratulazioni. Il pagamento è stato elaborato con successo e ti sarà accreditato a breve.
 Tentativo di pagamento
Congratulazioni Bailian Direct! Il pagamento è stato elaborato con successo e ti sarà accreditato nel giro di da tre a cinque giorni.
In data 03/25/26 13:20 CET, abbiamo avviato un trasferimento sul tuo metodo di pagamento (conto bancario che termina con 305) dell’importo di €
 353,69.
 Se l’importo è inferiore a quanto atteso, tieni in considerazione le seguenti domande:
 Hai un saldo non disponibile? Amazon potrebbe trattenere una certa somma per coprire i costi di eventuali resi, reclami o contestazioni di una transazione (chargeback) da parte degli acquirenti. In questo caso, il saldo finale nel tuo report sui pagamenti mostrerà il saldo non disponibile corrispondente alla cifra trattenuta.
 Le tue vendite coprono tutte le commissioni e i resi per questo ciclo di fatturazione? L’importo del pagamento rispecchia le attività di vendita, le commissioni di vendita e le tariffe per promozioni o servizi. Ti consigliamo di rivedere il report sui pagamenti nella scheda Report di Seller Central per comprendere le diverse spese

RE:[CASE 12260096222] 其他账户问题
时间分组：last7 邮箱：account_1 发件人：Assistenza venditori Amazon <merch.service05@amazon.it> 日期：Wed, 25 Mar 2026 01:28:13 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:01:08
展开查看邮件预览 
尊敬的卖家：您好！
关于您咨询的ASIN：B0GCKF423W没有购物车的问题，现解答如下：
经相关团队调查后回复,内容如下：
我们已审核您的商品,根据亚马逊商城公平定价政策，该商品不符合推荐商品的要求,因为它似乎过高。 您可以降低商品价格以重新获得推荐报价资格， 或者,您也可以提供证据来证实您的商品价格,我们将重新评估该商品。
我们理解这不是您想要的结果，我们已再次为您核实是否还有其他方案，如有进展我们会尽快回复您，请耐心等待。
发送给您的邮件内容会自带评价链接，这不代表您的案例被关闭，该案例我们仍在处理中，请您耐心等待回复。
欢迎向亚马逊提交反馈，从而帮助亚马逊改善您的开店体验。
您对我们提供的支持是否满意？
如果是，请单击此处
https://sellercentral-europe.amazon.com/hz/case-dashboard/hmd?p=ASPTQL867R2ET&c=12260096222&k=hy
如果否，请单击此处
https://sellercentral-europe.amazon.com/hz/case-dashboard/hmd?p=ASPTQL867R2ET&c=12260096222&k=hn
La ringraziamo per aver scelto Amazon.
Jun C.
Supporto al venditore
=======================================
Se desidera ricevere aiuto da altri venditori, visiti il nostro Forum per i venditori a questo link: https://sellercentral.amazon.it/forums/
Vuole aumentare le vendite? Provi Logistica di Amazon: http://www.amazon.it/LogisticaDiAmazon
Per maggiori informazioni, visiti: http://sellercentral-europe.amazon.com/gp/help
Visita la nostra Seller University per contenuti didattici: http://sellercentral-europe.amazon.com/learn/ref=sps_footer

Toma medidas: Información importante sobre tus listings de producto
 Nos ponemos en contacto contigo porque has publicado productos que requieren que aportes documentación sobre cumplimiento.
 Listings de producto a los que les falta la documentación sobre cumplimiento solicitada
 Hola:
 Nos ponemos en contacto contigo porque has publicado productos que requieren que aportes documentación sobre cumplimiento. Haz clic en "Revisar requisitos de cumplimiento" a continuación para ver la lista de productos en cuestión y enviar la documentación sobre cumplimiento solicitada. Si no envías la documentación dentro del plazo indicado para cada producto en este enlace, es posible que eliminemos los listings afectados.
 Revisar requisitos de cumplimiento
 La tabla siguiente contiene una muestra de los listings afectados. Haz clic en "Revisar requisitos de cumplimiento" para ver todos los listings afectados.
 SKU ASIN Estado del listing BL-CXJM0602 B0FBMMFXW7 En riesgo de retirada BL-CXJM0603 B0FBMMFXW7 En riesgo de retirada
 ¿A qué se debe esto?
Con este requisito nos aseguramos de que los productos cumplan con la legislación local y de que sean seguros para los clientes.
 ¿Cómo puedo segui

96
Wymagane działanie: Ważna informacja dotycząca Twoich ofert produktów
 kontaktujemy się z Tobą, ponieważ wystawiasz produkty, dla których niezbędne jest złożenie dokumentów potwierdzających zgodność z wymogami.
 Do ofert produktów brakuje obowiązkowych dokumentów dotyczących zgodności z wymogami
 Dzień dobry,
 kontaktujemy się z Tobą, ponieważ wystawiasz produkty, dla których niezbędne jest przedłożenie dokumentów potwierdzających zgodność z wymogami. Kliknij opcję „Wyświetl wymagania dotyczące zgodności z wymogami” poniżej, aby wyświetlić listę produktów, których dotyczy problem, i przesłać wymagane dokumenty potwierdzające zgodność z wymogami. Jeśli nie prześlesz dokumentów w terminie wskazanym dla każdego produktu na tej stronie, możemy usunąć oferty, których dotyczy problem.
 Wyświetl wymagania dotyczące zgodności z wymogami
 Poniższa tabela zawiera przykłady ofert, których dotyczy problem. Kliknij pozycję „Wyświetl wymagania dotyczące zgodności z wymogami”, aby zobaczyć wszystkie oferty, których dotyczy problem.
 SKU ASIN Status oferty BL-CXJM0603 B0FBMMFXW7 Zagrożone usunięciem BL-CXJM0602 B0FBMMFXW7 Zagrożone usunięciem
 Skąd wynikła ta sytuacja?
Wymóg ten pomaga zagwaran

 Bonjour ONLYFUN FR,
 Certains de vos produits mis en vente ont été désactivés en raison de l’absence d’exigences de conformité obligatoires pour vos produits. Consultez les détails et les étapes suivantes ci-dessous. Les produits mis en vente concernés figurent à la fin de cet e-mail.
 Pourquoi cela se produit-il ?
 Nous prenons cette mesure, car ces produits n’incluent pas toutes les informations de conformité obligatoires. Consultez notre page d’aide Sécurité et conformité des produits pour obtenir des informations sur les lois, les réglementations et les politiques Amazon applicables. Nous avons utilisé une combinaison de moyens automatisés et de contrôles menés par des personnes expérimentées pour identifier ce problème et prendre cette décision.
 Le tableau situé à la fin de cet e-mail présente les exigences de conformité spécifiques aux produits.
 Comment réactiver mes mises en vente ?

Przesyłanie dokumentacji dotyczącej bezpieczeństwa produktu w celu ponownego aktywowania ofert
时间分组：last7 邮箱：account_1 发件人：Amazon Services <donotreply@amazon.com> 日期：Tue, 24 Mar 2026 19:18:27 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:01:09
展开查看邮件预览 
96
 Przesyłanie dokumentacji dotyczącej bezpieczeństwa produktu w celu ponownego aktywowania ofert
 Dzień dobry ONLYFUN PL,
 niektóre z Twoich ofert zostały zdezaktywowane z powodu niespełnienia obowiązków dotyczących zgodności wystawianych przez Ciebie produktów z wymogami. Poniżej znajdziesz szczegółowe informacje oraz dalsze instrukcje. Oferty produktów, których dotyczy problem, wskazano na końcu niniejszej wiadomości e-mail.
 Dlaczego tak się stało?
 Podjęliśmy to działanie, ponieważ w przypadku tych produktów nie dostarczono obowiązkowych informacji dotyczących zgodności z wymogami. Więcej informacji na temat mających zastosowanie przepisów ustawowych i wykonawczych oraz zasad Amazon znajdziesz na stronie Bezpieczeństwo i zgodność produktu z wymogami . Do identyfikacji problemu i podjęcia decyzji wykorzystaliśmy zautomatyzowane narzędzia, a otrzymane za ich pomocą wyniki poddaliśmy weryfikacji przez eksperta.
 Informacje na temat wymogów dotyczących zgodności dla poszczególnych produktów znajdziesz w tabeli na końcu tej wiadomości e-mail.
 Jak mogę ponownie aktywować oferty?
 Aby dostarczyć niezbędne informacje dotyczące zgodności z wymogami, przejdź do panelu Kondycja konta i

 Presenta la documentación sobre seguridad del producto para reactivar los listings
 Hola, Li Jianyong:
 Algunos de tus listings se han desactivado debido a que tus productos no cumplen los requisitos obligatorios. Revisa a continuación los detalles y siguientes pasos. Los listings afectados aparecen al final de este correo electrónico.
 ¿A qué se debe esto?
 Tomamos esta medida porque a estos productos les falta información de cumplimiento normativo obligatoria. Para más información sobre las leyes, normativas y políticas de Amazon aplicables, consulta Cumplimiento y seguridad de los productos . Hemos usado una combinación de medios automatizados y revisión humana experta para identificar la incidencia y tomar una decisión.
 En la tabla que aparece al final de este correo electrónico se proporcionan los requisitos de cumplimiento normativo específicos del producto.
 ¿Cómo puedo reactivar mis listings?
 Para proporcionar la información de cumplimiento normativo obligatoria, ve a la página Estado de la cuenta y localiza las solicitudes de cumplimiento normativo del producto:
-
 Si dispones de la documentación obligatoria, sigue las instrucciones para presentar los documentos de c

96
This title will display on mobile devices
 Congratulazioni. Il pagamento è stato elaborato con successo e ti sarà accreditato a breve.
 Tentativo di pagamento
Congratulazioni Xiangyuexin! Il pagamento è stato elaborato con successo e ti sarà accreditato nel giro di da tre a cinque giorni.
In data 03/24/26 14:35 CET, abbiamo avviato un trasferimento sul tuo metodo di pagamento (conto bancario che termina con 944) dell’importo di €
 244,48.
 Se l’importo è inferiore a quanto atteso, tieni in considerazione le seguenti domande:
 Hai un saldo non disponibile? Amazon potrebbe trattenere una certa somma per coprire i costi di eventuali resi, reclami o contestazioni di una transazione (chargeback) da parte degli acquirenti. In questo caso, il saldo finale nel tuo report sui pagamenti mostrerà il saldo non disponibile corrispondente alla cifra trattenuta.
 Le tue vendite coprono tutte le commissioni e i resi per questo ciclo di fatturazione? L’importo del pagamento rispecchia le attività di vendita, le commissioni di vendita e le tariffe per promozioni o servizi. Ti consigliamo di rivedere il report sui pagamenti nella scheda Report di Seller Central per comprendere le diverse spese che

借助 Climate Pledge Friendly 推动业务增长
尊敬的卖家，
参与亚马逊 Climate Pledge Friendly 计划的商品，在获得资格后的第一年内，平均可实现超过 12% 的销售增长和 10% 的商品页面浏览量提升*。
我们诚邀您加入 Climate Pledge Friendly（CPF），提升您更具可持续性的商品曝光度，同时助力业务增长。
拥有认可的[可持续发展认证](https://go.amazonsellerservices.com/e/229492/92469229-Wk13-node-21221608011/7z2bhly/6571059691/h/eRCozJPc0P6D8HNBb3qP94H1ForkIsaCTky_5R89ARk)的商品，有机会获得 Climate Pledge Friendly 标识，从而在消费者中脱颖而出。
[立即开始](https://go.amazonsellerservices.com/e/229492/229-Wk13-mons-sel-locale-zh-CN/7z2bhm2/6571059691/h/eRCozJPc0P6D8HNBb3qP94H1ForkIsaCTky_5R89ARk)
[CPF banner](https://go.amazonsellerservices.com/e/229492/229-Wk13-mons-sel-locale-zh-CN/7z2bhm2/6571059691/h/eRCozJPc0P6D8HNBb3qP94H1ForkIsaCTky_5R89ARk)
优先审核的 ASIN
这些商品选自您的商品目录，可能是获得 Climate Pledge Friendly 认证的潜在候选。

尊敬的卖家：您好！
我们了解到您就B0GCKF423W 购物车的问题联系我们，您遇到的问题需要内部专员帮助解决。我们会将您的问题转发给该专员，并在对方提供解决方案后通过电子邮件通知您。感谢您耐心等待我们处理该 case。
请注意，您收到的电子邮件中可能包含反馈邀请，但这并不意味着您的 case 已经关闭，我们将继续通过该 case 跟进您的问题。
欢迎向亚马逊提交反馈，从而帮助亚马逊改善您的开店体验。
您对我们提供的支持是否满意？

 Presenta la documentación sobre seguridad del producto para reactivar los listings
 Hola, Bailian Direct:
 Algunos de tus listings se han desactivado debido a que tus productos no cumplen los requisitos obligatorios. Revisa a continuación los detalles y siguientes pasos. Los listings afectados aparecen al final de este correo electrónico.
 ¿A qué se debe esto?
 Tomamos esta medida porque a estos productos les falta información de cumplimiento normativo obligatoria. Para más información sobre las leyes, normativas y políticas de Amazon aplicables, consulta Cumplimiento y seguridad de los productos . Hemos usado una combinación de medios automatizados y revisión humana experta para identificar la incidencia y tomar una decisión.
 En la tabla que aparece al final de este correo electrónico se proporcionan los requisitos de cumplimiento normativo específicos del producto.
 ¿Cómo puedo reactivar mis listings?
 Para proporcionar la información de cumplimiento normativo obligatoria, ve a la página Estado de la cuenta y localiza las solicitudes de cumplimiento normativo del producto:
-
 Si dispones de la documentación obligatoria, sigue las instrucciones para presentar los documentos d

 Przesyłanie dokumentacji dotyczącej bezpieczeństwa produktu w celu ponownego aktywowania ofert
 Dzień dobry Bailian Direct,
 niektóre z Twoich ofert zostały zdezaktywowane z powodu niespełnienia obowiązków dotyczących zgodności wystawianych przez Ciebie produktów z wymogami. Poniżej znajdziesz szczegółowe informacje oraz dalsze instrukcje. Oferty produktów, których dotyczy problem, wskazano na końcu niniejszej wiadomości e-mail.
 Dlaczego tak się stało?
 Podjęliśmy to działanie, ponieważ w przypadku tych produktów nie dostarczono obowiązkowych informacji dotyczących zgodności z wymogami. Więcej informacji na temat mających zastosowanie przepisów ustawowych i wykonawczych oraz zasad Amazon znajdziesz na stronie Bezpieczeństwo i zgodność produktu z wymogami . Do identyfikacji problemu i podjęcia decyzji wykorzystaliśmy zautomatyzowane narzędzia, a otrzymane za ich pomocą wyniki poddaliśmy weryfikacji przez eksperta.
 Informacje na temat wymogów dotyczących zgodności dla poszczególnych produktów znajdziesz w tabeli na końcu tej wiadomości e-mail.
 Jak mogę ponownie aktywować oferty?
 Aby dostarczyć niezbędne informacje dotyczące zgodności z wymogami, przejdź do panelu Kondycja kon

 Skicka in produktsäkerhetsdokumentation för att återaktivera produktposter
 Hej Bailian Direct!
 Vissa av dina produktposter har inaktiverats på grund av att det saknas obligatorisk överensstämmelse för dina produkter. Granska informationen och följande steg nedan. De berörda produktposterna visas i slutet av det här e-postmeddelandet.
 Varför händer det här?
 Vi vidtar den här åtgärden eftersom det saknas obligatorisk information om överensstämmelse för de här produkterna. Läs vår hjälpsida för Produktsäkerhet och -överensstämmelse för information om tillämpliga lagar, förordningar och Amazons policyer. Vi har använt oss av både automatiserade metoder och mänskliga expertgranskare för att identifiera problemet och fatta det här beslutet.
 Tabellen i slutet av detta e-postmeddelande innehåller produktspecifika krav för överensstämmelse.
 Hur återaktiverar jag mina produktposter?
 Om du vill tillhandahålla den begärda överensstämmelseinformationen går du till sidan Kontostatus och letar upp begäranden om produktöverensstämmelse:
-
 Om du har den obligatoriska dokumentationen ska du skicka in dina överensstämmelsedokument enligt instruktionerna. Vi återaktiverar endast produkter

 Invia la documentazione sulla sicurezza del prodotto per riattivare le offerte
 Gentile Bailian Direct,
 Alcune delle tue offerte sono state disattivate a causa della mancanza di alcuni requisiti di conformità obbligatori per i tuoi prodotti. Rivedi i dettagli e i passi successivi riportati di seguito. Puoi visualizzare le offerte interessate in fondo a questa e-mail.
 Ciò a cosa è dovuto?
 Abbiamo intrapreso questo provvedimento in quanto i tuoi prodotti non dispongono delle informazioni obbligatorie sulla conformità. Consulta la pagina di aiuto Sicurezza e conformità dei prodotti per informazioni sulle leggi, le normative e le politiche di Amazon applicabili. Questa decisione è stata presa sulla base dei risultati di un'analisi effettuata in parte tramite revisione umana e in parte per mezzo di sistemi automatizzati.
 La tabella alla fine di questa e-mail contiene i requisiti di conformità specifici per i prodotti.
 Come faccio a riattivare le mie offerte?
 Per fornire le informazioni di conformità richieste, vai alla pagina Stato dell'account per individuare le richieste di conformità dei prodotti:
-
 Se disponi della documentazione richiesta, segui le istruzioni per inviare

Wymagane działanie: Ważna informacja dotycząca Twoich ofert produktów
 kontaktujemy się z Tobą, ponieważ wystawiasz produkty, dla których niezbędne jest złożenie dokumentów potwierdzających zgodność z wymogami.
 Do ofert produktów brakuje obowiązkowych dokumentów dotyczących zgodności z wymogami
 Dzień dobry,
 kontaktujemy się z Tobą, ponieważ wystawiasz produkty, dla których niezbędne jest przedłożenie dokumentów potwierdzających zgodność z wymogami. Kliknij opcję „Wyświetl wymagania dotyczące zgodności z wymogami” poniżej, aby wyświetlić listę produktów, których dotyczy problem, i przesłać wymagane dokumenty potwierdzające zgodność z wymogami. Jeśli nie prześlesz dokumentów w terminie wskazanym dla każdego produktu na tej stronie, możemy usunąć oferty, których dotyczy problem.
 Wyświetl wymagania dotyczące zgodności z wymogami
 Poniższa tabela zawiera przykłady ofert, których dotyczy problem. Kliknij pozycję „Wyświetl wymagania dotyczące zgodności z wymogami”, aby zobaczyć wszystkie oferty, których dotyczy problem.

Aborda los requisitos de cumplimiento de tus listings
时间分组：last7 邮箱：account_2 发件人：Notificaciones de Seller Central (sin buzón electrónico) <donotreply@amazon.com> 日期：Mon, 23 Mar 2026 21:43:19 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:01:39
展开查看邮件预览 
96
Toma medidas: Información importante sobre tus listings de producto
 Nos ponemos en contacto contigo porque has publicado productos que requieren que aportes documentación sobre cumplimiento.
 Listings de producto a los que les falta la documentación sobre cumplimiento solicitada
 Hola:
 Nos ponemos en contacto contigo porque has publicado productos que requieren que aportes documentación sobre cumplimiento. Haz clic en "Revisar requisitos de cumplimiento" a continuación para ver la lista de productos en cuestión y enviar la documentación sobre cumplimiento solicitada. Si no envías la documentación dentro del plazo indicado para cada producto en este enlace, es posible que eliminemos los listings afectados.
 Revisar requisitos de cumplimiento
 La tabla siguiente contiene una muestra de los listings afectados. Haz clic en "Revisar requisitos de cumplimiento" para ver todos los listings afectados.

 Hola, ONLYFUN ES:

 ¿A qué se debe esto?

Para más información sobre las leyes, normativas y políticas de Amazon aplicables, consulta Cumplimiento y seguridad de los productos . 时间分组：last7 邮箱：account_1 发件人：Amazon Services <donotreply@amazon.com> 日期：Mon, 23 Mar 2026 19:15:53 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:01:10
展开查看邮件预览 
96
 Przesyłanie dokumentacji dotyczącej bezpieczeństwa produktu w celu ponownego aktywowania ofert
 Dzień dobry ONLYFUN PL,
 niektóre z Twoich ofert zostały zdezaktywowane z powodu niespełnienia obowiązków dotyczących zgodności wystawianych przez Ciebie produktów z wymogami. Poniżej znajdziesz szczegółowe informacje oraz dalsze instrukcje. Oferty produktów, których dotyczy problem, wskazano na końcu niniejszej wiadomości e-mail.
 Dlaczego tak się stało?
 Podjęliśmy to działanie, ponieważ w przypadku tych produktów nie dostarczono obowiązkowych informacji dotyczących zgodności z wymogami. Więcej informacji na temat mających zastosowanie przepisów ustawowych i wykonawczych oraz zasad Amazon znajdziesz na stronie Bezpieczeństwo i zgodność produktu z wymogami . Do identyfikacji problemu i podjęcia decyzji wykorzystaliśmy zautomatyzowane narzędzia, a otrzymane za ich pomocą wyniki poddaliśmy weryfikacji przez eksperta.
 Informacje na temat wymogów dotyczących zgodności dla poszczególnych produktów znajdziesz w tabeli na końcu tej wiadomości e-mail.
 Jak mogę ponownie aktywować oferty?
 Aby dostarczyć niezbędne informacje dotyczące zgodności z wymogami, przejdź do panelu Kondycja konta i

 Nous prenons cette mesure, car ces produits n’incluent pas toutes les informations de conformité obligatoires. Consultez notre page d’aide Sécurité et conformité des produits pour obtenir des informations sur les lois, les réglementations et les politiques Amazon applicables. Nous avons utilisé une combinaison de moyens automatisés et de contrôles menés par des personnes expérimentées pour identifier ce problème et prendre cette décision.

 Skicka in produktsäkerhetsdokumentation för att återaktivera produktposter
 Hej ONLYFUN SE!
 Vissa av dina produktposter har inaktiverats på grund av att det saknas obligatorisk överensstämmelse för dina produkter. Granska informationen och följande steg nedan. De berörda produktposterna visas i slutet av det här e-postmeddelandet.
 Varför händer det här?
 Vi vidtar den här åtgärden eftersom det saknas obligatorisk information om överensstämmelse för de här produkterna. Läs vår hjälpsida för Produktsäkerhet och -överensstämmelse för information om tillämpliga lagar, förordningar och Amazons policyer. Vi har använt oss av både automatiserade metoder och mänskliga expertgranskare för att identifiera problemet och fatta det här beslutet.
 Tabellen i slutet av detta e-postmeddelande innehåller produktspecifika krav för överensstämmelse.
 Hur återaktiverar jag mina produktposter?
 Om du vill tillhandahålla den begärda överensstämmelseinformationen går du till sidan Kontostatus och letar upp begäranden om produktöverensstämmelse:
-
 Om du har den obligatoriska dokumentationen ska du skicka in dina överensstämmelsedokument enligt instruktionerna. Vi återaktiverar endast produkter som

Submit your Prime Day 2026 Deals on March 24, review updated fees and eligibility
时间分组：last7 邮箱：account_4 发件人：The Amazon Services team <donotreply@amazon.com> 日期：Mon, 23 Mar 2026 18:28:43 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:00:26
展开查看邮件预览 
96
 Get ready to make this Prime Day your best yet.
 Hello,
 Get ready to make this Prime Day your best yet. We’ve made changes to promotion eligibility requirements to ensure deals deliver the value customers expect during our biggest shopping events like Prime Day. We’ve also simplified promotion fees to better align your costs and set FBA inbound dates to ensure your products are Prime-ready for the big event.
 Promotional eligibility
 To ensure deals offer substantial value to customers, and in turn drive higher engagement and more sales for you, Prime Exclusive price discounts and deals must now:
- Be priced at or below the lowest sales price, including promotional prices from previous deals, coupons and price discounts, over the past 60 days .
- Offer at least 5% off the lowest sales price, including promotional prices from previous deals, coupons and price discounts, over the past 30 days . We’re also giving you more time to act. The deal submission window will be open from March 24, 2026, through June 19, 2026. To schedule a deal, go to Create a new deal .
 For full eligibility details, go to Deals for events and Price discounts and events .
 You can use the Deals dashboard
Presenta tus ofertas para Prime Day 2026 el 24 de marzo y revisa las tarifas y requisitos actualizados
时间分组：last7 邮箱：account_2 发件人：Amazon Services Europe <donotreply@amazon.com> 日期：Mon, 23 Mar 2026 18:24:54 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:01:39
展开查看邮件预览 
96
 Prepárate para que este Prime Day sea aún mejor.
 Hola:
 Prepárate para que este Prime Day sea aún mejor. Hemos hecho cambios en los requisitos de las promociones para garantizar que ofrezcan el valor que los clientes esperan durante los eventos de compra más importantes, como Prime Day. También hemos simplificado las tarifas de las promociones para alinear mejor tus costes y hemos establecido fechas de envío a Logística de Amazon para asegurarnos de que los productos estén preparados para Prime para el gran evento.
 Requisitos de las promociones
 Para garantizar que las promociones ofrezcan un valor considerable a los clientes y, a su vez, aumentar el interés de los clientes y las ventas, las ofertas y descuentos sobre el precio exclusivos de Prime ahora tienen que ofrecer al menos un 5 % de descuento sobre el precio de venta más bajo, contando con los precios de ofertas, cupones y descuentos sobre el precio anteriores de los últimos 30 días.
 También te damos más tiempo para actuar. El plazo para presentar ofertas estará abierto desde el 24 de marzo de 2026 hasta el 19 de junio de 2026. Para programar una oferta, ve a Crear una oferta .
 Para ver todos los detalles de los req

 Dien productveiligheidsdocumentatie in om productvermeldingen opnieuw te activeren
 Hallo Li Jianyong,
 Sommige van je productvermeldingen zijn gedeactiveerd omdat er verplichte nalevingsvereisten voor je producten ontbreken. Bekijk de gegevens en de stappen hieronder. De betreffende productvermeldingen worden aan het einde van deze e-mail weergegeven.
 Waarom gebeurt dit?
 We hebben deze actie ondernomen omdat voor deze producten verplichte nalevingsinformatie ontbreekt. Raadpleeg onze hulp-pagina Productveiligheid en -conformiteit voor informatie over de toepasselijke wet- en regelgeving en het Amazon-beleid. We hebben gebruikgemaakt van een combinatie van geautomatiseerde middelen en deskundige menselijke beoordeling om dit probleem te identificeren en deze beslissing te nemen.
 De tabel aan het einde van deze e-mail bevat productspecifieke nalevingsvereisten.
 Hoe activeer ik mijn productvermeldingen opnieuw?
 Als je de vereiste nalevingsgegevens wilt verstrekken, ga je naar de pagina Accountstatus en zoek je de aanvragen voor productconformiteit:
-
 Als je over de vereiste documentatie beschikt, volg je de instructies om je nalevingsdocumenten in te dienen. We zullen allee

This title will display on mobile devices
 Félicitations ! Votre paiement est en cours et arrivera sous peu.
 Tentative de versement
Félicitations, Bailian Direct ! Votre paiement est en cours et arrivera sous trois à cinq jours.
Le 03/23/26 14:53 CET, nous avons effectué un virement d’un montant de €
 241.55 sur le compte lié à votre méthode de paiement (compte bancaire se terminant par 305).
 Si le montant est inférieur au montant auquel vous vous attendiez, voici quelques questions à vous poser :

Le montant du paiement reflète votre activité commerciale, les frais de vente et les frais relatifs aux promotions et aux services. 时间分组：last7 邮箱：account_1 发件人：Assistenza venditori Amazon <merch.service05@amazon.it> 日期：Sun, 22 Mar 2026 16:11:20 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:01:12

La ringraziamo per aver contattato il Supporto al venditore di Amazon.
Abbiamo aperto un caso riguardo al suo problema. Un membro del nostro team la contatterà appena possibile. Rispondiamo alla maggior parte delle e-mail entro 12 ore.
Per vedere i suoi ordini ed effettuare operazioni a essi relative, come per esempio l'emissione di rimborsi, visiti Seller Central al link: http://sellercentral-europe.amazon.com. Maggiori informazioni su come gestire i prodotti, gli ordini e il suo negozio online sono disponibili nelle pagine di aiuto di Seller Central.
Per contattarci nuovamente riguardo a questo problema utilizzi il modulo di contatto di Seller Central cliccando su questo link:
https://sellercentral-europe.amazon.com/cu/case-dashboard/view-case?caseID=12255411762
Se desidera ricevere aiuto da altri venditori, può visitare il nostro Forum per i venditori a questo link: https://sellercentral.amazon.it/forums/
La preghiamo di non rispondere a questo messaggio. Questa e-mail è stata inviata da un indirizzo che non accetta posta in entrata.

 Tentativo di pagamento
Congratulazioni Bailian Direct! Il pagamento è stato elaborato con successo e ti sarà accreditato nel giro di da tre a cinque giorni.
In data 03/22/26 15:31 CET, abbiamo avviato un trasferimento sul tuo metodo di pagamento (conto bancario che termina con 305) dell’importo di €
 229,15.
 Se l’importo è inferiore a quanto atteso, tieni in considerazione le seguenti domande:
 Hai un saldo non disponibile? Amazon potrebbe trattenere una certa somma per coprire i costi di eventuali resi, reclami o contestazioni di una transazione (chargeback) da parte degli acquirenti. In questo caso, il saldo finale nel tuo report sui pagamenti mostrerà il saldo non disponibile corrispondente alla cifra trattenuta.
 Le tue vendite coprono tutte le commissioni e i resi per questo ciclo di fatturazione? L’importo del pagamento rispecchia le attività di vendita, le commissioni di vendita e le tariffe per promozioni o servizi. Ti consigliamo di rivedere il report sui pagamenti nella scheda Report di Seller Central per comprendere le diverse spese

RE:[CASE 19740961221] CA - Suspected intellectual Property Violation Appeal for MINECRAFT - ASIN: B0GCJR4ZHR
时间分组：last7 邮箱：account_4 发件人：Amazon Seller Support <merch.service05@amazon.com> 日期：Sun, 22 Mar 2026 13:09:32 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:00:27
展开查看邮件预览 
Hello from Amazon Selling Partner Support,
Thanks for giving us the chance to help you and providing us with detailed explanation along with attached supporting images.
We acknowledge that we have completely read your correspondence and investigated the listing.
We have completed our review and have reinstated your listing {{B0GCJR4ZHR}}.
If your listing is still inactive, then update the listing using the steps mentioned below, and your listing will be active within 24 hours.
To update the listing:
Go to Seller Central and navigate to "Inventory" and click "Manage all inventory."
Search for the ASIN you want to update in the search bar. Click three buttons on the right side of the ASIN you want to update and select "Edit listing" from the drop-down menu next to the listing that you want to update
Update the price and quantity if the listing is Merchant Fulfilled. For Fulfillment by Amazon (FBA) offers, update the price.
Click "Save and finish".
If the listing is inactive for 24 hours after the update, then go to the link given below to contact us:
https://sellercentral.amazon.com/help/center
For more information on our Intellectual Property policy, go to:
https://sellercentral.ama

尊敬的卖家：
						我们注意到您在店铺中有上架教育、办公类商品，特此预告您将有机会参与即将到来的全球教育采购 “超级旺季”！
						每年 4-7 月欧美迎来学期末大促，紧接着7-10月进入返校季，在此期间学校批量采购教学设备，家庭为子女豪囤文具用品，企业为员工升级办公配置—— 千亿级市场需求在亚马逊集中爆发。根据亚马逊内部数据，相关ASIN转化率最高提升2.4倍。
						为了帮助您把握这波商机，我们向您提前预告在这段时间内值得关注的选品方向，助您提前布局商品，做好库存准备。
						哪些品类有机会爆发？
						美国站
						教室用品、书写工具及配件
						纸张/笔记本、美术用品
						家具、收纳与储物用品
						笔记本电脑/平板/显示器
						IT配件、餐饮服务用品
						清洁用品与设备、玩具
						欧洲站
						办公用品、PC电脑
						家居用品、家具
						电子产品、厨房用品
						商业/工业/科学用品
						玩具、家居装修用品
						以上仅为部分热门品类，您可结合店铺情况，重点关注与“教学办公、IT、家具与收纳、设施维护”相关的产品，点击下方文字了解具体商品推荐：
						教学办公

Votre statut d’éligibilité à Prime Expédié par Amazon pour France a changé
时间分组：last7 邮箱：account_4 发件人：Amazon Services <donotreply@amazon.com> 日期：Sat, 21 Mar 2026 01:11:58 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:00:28
展开查看邮件预览 
96
Bonjour,
L’éligibilité à Prime de vos offres Expédié par Amazon pour France concernant les critères répertoriés ci-dessous a été modifiée en raison de changements dans vos statistiques vendeur Prime. Consultez les statuts mis à jour ci-dessous.
 Groupe de statistiques Tranche de taille du produit Critères État d’infraction Évaluation de la période de performances
 Statistiques du délai de livraison
 Taille standard
 Vues
 Premier avertissement
 Échec
 Pourquoi cette mesure a-t-elle été prise ?
Nous vous envoyons cette notification, car nous avons constaté que vos statistiques vendeur Prime ont changé depuis la dernière période d’évaluation, ce qui a entraîné la mise à jour du statut d’un ou de plusieurs des critères mentionnés ci-dessus.
Pour conserver l’éligibilité à Prime pour vos catégories de produits, vos offres doivent répondre aux objectifs de performance du service Expédié par Amazon, notamment en ce qui concerne la rapidité et la fiabilité de la livraison, le service client et les retours prépayés gratuits. Vous pouvez consulter la liste complète de tous les objectifs de performance qui affectent votre statut d’éligibilité à Prime en téléchargeant votre rapport Éligibil
货件/库存类
共 6 封
展开/收起
Create FBA removal order by 2026-04-09
时间分组：last7 邮箱：account_3 发件人：Fulfilment by Amazon <donotreply@amazon.com> 日期：Fri, 27 Mar 2026 09:57:24 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:00:06
展开查看邮件预览 
96
Automated removals of unfulfillable inventory
 Required removals: First notification
 Required removals: First notification
 Hello,
Your FBA inventory listed below became unsellable in the past seven days. You must create a removal order by 2026-04-09 or these items will be disposed of. Removal fees will apply. Review the affected items and next steps below.
Unsellable products:
- FNSKU: X002A05YW5 Quantity: 2
 Why is this happening?
This action is required because these items are no longer in sellable condition in our fulfilment centres. According to our FBA Required Removals policy, all unsuitable units must be removed within 14 days of notification. To learn more, go to our FBA Required Removals policy .
We leveraged a combination of automated means to identify this issue and make this decision.
 How do I address this?
Follow these steps to manage your unsellable inventory:
- Check your complete list and quantity of unsellable items in the Manage FBA inventory .
- Create a removal order (removal fees apply) by following the instructions in Remove inventory overview .
 To avoid future manual inventory removal orders, set up Automated Unfulfillable Removals function in your FBA
Disposal order created for unsellable FBA inventory

96
Automated Removals of Unfulfillable Inventory
 Final notice: Disposal order for your unfulfillable FBA inventory
 Final notice: Disposal order for your unfulfillable FBA inventory
 Hello,
You have unfulfillable inventory that has been in a fulfilment centre for more than 14 days. We have created a disposal order for these items.
 Why is this happening?
This action is required because these unfulfillable items have remained in our fulfilment centres for more than 14 days after notification. According to our FBA Required Removals policy, cancelling a required removal order is not permitted. To learn more, visit our FBA Required Removals policy .
 Removal order ID:
- CQhO1/+c38
 Unsellable Products:
- FNSKU: X002C14R1B Quantity: 1
 For more information about the disposal order process, see Remove inventory from a fulfilment centre .
 To monitor your unfulfillable inventory, see the Manage FBA Inventory for total unsellable quantities or the Recommended Removal report for unsellable and aged inventory details.
 The Fulfilment by Amazon Team
 Report an issue with this email
 If you have any questions visit: Seller Central
 To change your email preferences visit: Notification Preferen
Create FBA removal order by 2026-04-07
时间分组：last7 邮箱：account_1 发件人：Fulfilment by Amazon <donotreply@amazon.com> 日期：Wed, 25 Mar 2026 10:33:19 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:01:08
展开查看邮件预览 
96
Automated removals of unfulfillable inventory
 Required removals: First notification
 Required removals: First notification
 Hello,
Your FBA inventory listed below became unsellable in the past seven days. You must create a removal order by 2026-04-07 or these items will be disposed of. Removal fees will apply. Review the affected items and next steps below.
Unsellable products:
- FNSKU: X002B54C4Z Quantity: 5
 Why is this happening?
This action is required because these items are no longer in sellable condition in our fulfilment centres. According to our FBA Required Removals policy, all unsuitable units must be removed within 14 days of notification. To learn more, go to our FBA Required Removals policy .
We leveraged a combination of automated means to identify this issue and make this decision.
 How do I address this?
Follow these steps to manage your unsellable inventory:
- Check your complete list and quantity of unsellable items in the Manage FBA inventory .
- Create a removal order (removal fees apply) by following the instructions in Remove inventory overview .
 To avoid future manual inventory removal orders, set up Automated Unfulfillable Removals function in your FBA

Important: Stranded inventory scheduled for automatic removal/disposal
时间分组：last7 邮箱：account_4 发件人：Fulfilment by Amazon <donotreply@amazon.com> 日期：Tue, 24 Mar 2026 12:38:05 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:00:25
展开查看邮件预览 
96
Stranded SKUs scheduled for automatic removal
 Hello from Fulfilment by Amazon,
You are receiving this message because you have stranded inventory in an Amazon fulfilment centre that is scheduled for automatic removal. Stranded inventory is inventory without a buyable offer and requires you to either reactivate the listing or remove the inventory.
As of 2026-03-24, you have 4 new stranded ASINs scheduled for automatic removal, with up to 50 of these listed below. You may have additional units scheduled for automatic removal from previous email notifications. For a full view of units scheduled for automatic removal and their removal date(s), visit Fix stranded inventory and sort by Auto-removal date . The Auto-removal date column may take up to 24 hours to update. Standard FBA removal order fees apply.
 What happens to my stranded inventory?
Stranded inventory will be automatically removed from the fulfilment centre 90 days from the date the relevant inventory became stranded, unless you have configured your settings via Seller Central to accelerate this process. If you have not configured any settings, your stranded inventory will be removed in 90 days at your cost. If you have
Your Amazon-Fulfilled Inventory
时间分组：last7 邮箱：account_1 发件人：Fulfilment by Amazon Operations <fba-noreply@amazon.lu> 日期：Mon, 23 Mar 2026 20:13:40 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:01:10
展开查看邮件预览 
Dear Seller,
We recently notified you about the removal of your listing(s) for the product(s) listed below due to a safety recall.
You were required to submit a removal request for the ASIN(s) referenced below to have your inventory sent to a location of your choice within 30 days of the notification sent on 20/02/2026. Since no removal order was submitted since the notification was sent, we have submitted a disposal order for this inventory in accordance with our FBA policies.
For more information regarding the removal of your product(s), see the notification e-mail you received from our Seller Performance Team. If you have any further questions, please contact our Seller Support .
Thank you for your attention to this matter.
Yours faithfully,
Fulfilment by Amazon Team
Please note: this e-mail was sent from a notification-only address that cannot accept incoming e-mail. Please do not reply to this message.
Affected Product(s):
B0C8G1Q783
B0CJ3BMZNV
B0CJVMGYXN
 SPC-EUAmazon-1196270286826159
其他风险类
共 38 封

Dear Seller,
This is an email regarding FBA Offers for your Amazon Seller account. We are contacting you to let you know that you could be missing out on sales opportunities because of low/missing inventory for your ASIN offers in the attached sheet.
We recommend that you inbound additional inventory for your products immediately. To view the recommended replenishment quantity for these ASINs, go to “Restock inventory”:
https://sellercentral.amazon.ca/restockinventory/recommendations
Here is a sample of your high selling FBA ASINs, which are considered low in stock at the moment:
B0DMFL5X12, B0D7QHCF8J
You can download the full list of your ASIN at risk of out of stock at the following link:  https://www.sellercentral.amazon.ca/reportcentral/RestockReport/1
For more information about Restock tool, you can visit this help page - https://sellercentral.amazon.ca/gp/help/G201634550
If you need further help, please raise a case via contact us. - https://sellercentral.amazon.ca/cu/contact-us?ref=xx_ContactUs_xxxx_helphub

时间分组：last7 邮箱：account_4 发件人："fba-3p-buyability-improvement-us@amazon.com" <fba-3p-buyability-improvement-us@amazon.com> 日期：Wed, 25 Mar 2026 23:34:32 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:00:24
展开查看邮件预览 
Dear Selling Partner,
Greetings from Amazon.
We are reaching out to you to notify your seller central is in “Active” “Going on holidays” status. If you are currently not on vacation, please update the “Going on holidays” status to “Inactive” in seller central by clicking on the link below to activate all your listings -
https://www.sellercentral-europe.amazon.com/hz/sc/account-information
Also, we like to let you know that you could be missing out on sales opportunities because of low/missing inventory for your ASIN offers.
We recommend that you inbound additional inventory for your products immediately. To view the recommended replenishment quantity for these ASINs, go to “Restock inventory” at the following link: https://sellercentral.amazon.com/restockinventory/recommendations
If you need further help, please raise a case via contact us. - https://sellercentral.amazon.com/cu/contact-us?ref=xx_ContactUs_xxxx_helphub
If you are not the correct point of contact, please re-direct this email to the person who manages your Amazon Seller account.
If you wish to unsubscribe please REPLY ALL with the subject line ‘Unsubscribe’
Note: This email is unmonitored and any replies with question
[问题编号:12253542122]*需要您的帮助* 其他账户问题
时间分组：last7 邮箱：account_4 发件人："epr-de-weee-appeals-cn@amazon.com" <epr-de-weee-appeals-cn@amazon.com> 日期：Wed, 25 Mar 2026 07:02:19 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:00:25
展开查看邮件预览 
请注意，我们需要获得更多信息才能解决您的问题单。如果您仍需要帮助，请回复本邮件，并提供我们要求的下列详细信息。
如果您的问题已得到解决，则您无需执行任何其他操作，我们将关闭此问题单。
亚马逊支持
-- 初始消息 --
你好，
感谢您与我们联系。
我们已审核该请求，并需要您提供更多详细信息才能解决此问题。我们注意到 ASIN 缺少尺寸
带组合 设备类型：小型设备（光伏面板除外）和品牌：Crifeton
请通过回复此消息分享以下内容：
- 以下 ASIN 的数据表或用户手册：B0DSB4L5QS
欲了解更多信息，请访问：https://sellercentral-europe.amazon.com/help/hub/reference/G6SQMSCSKWJQEPJQ
感谢您在这一重要事项上的及时合作。
Freundliche Grüße
Bharath K.
Amazon Verkäuferservice
=======================================
BENÖTIGEN SIE WEITERE HILFE?
In den Verkäuferforen erhalten Sie Tipps und Hilfe von anderen Verkäufern: https://sellercentral-europe.amazon.com/forums/
Ausführliche Informationen zur Verwaltung Ihrer Produkte und Bestellungen finden Sie in den Hilfe Seiten für Verkäufer über die Suchfunktion in Seller Central.

Action requise : informations importantes concernant vos offres
 Nous vous contactons car vous avez avez des produits en vente qui nécessitent que vous soumettiez des documents de conformité.
 Nous n’avons pas les documents de conformité requis pour les produits mis en vente
 Bonjour,
 Nous vous contactons, car vous avez mis en vente des produits pour lesquels vous avez besoin de soumettre des documents de conformité. Cliquez sur Afficher les exigences de conformité ci-dessous pour consulter la liste des produits concernés et soumettre les documents de conformité requis. Si vous ne soumettez pas les documents d’ici la date limite indiquée pour chaque produit mentionné sur la page en question, nous nous réservons le droit de supprimer les mises en vente concernées.
 Afficher les exigences de conformité
 Le tableau ci-dessous contient un échantillon des mises en vente concernées. Cliquez sur Afficher les exigences de conformité pour afficher toutes les mises en vente concernées.

Répondez aux exigences de conformité pour vos mises en vente
时间分组：last7 邮箱：account_2 发件人：Notifications Amazon Seller Central (Ne pas répondre) <donotreply@amazon.com> 日期：Mon, 23 Mar 2026 21:43:12 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:01:39
展开查看邮件预览 
96
Action requise : informations importantes concernant vos offres
 Nous vous contactons car vous avez avez des produits en vente qui nécessitent que vous soumettiez des documents de conformité.
 Nous n’avons pas les documents de conformité requis pour les produits mis en vente
 Bonjour,
 Nous vous contactons, car vous avez mis en vente des produits pour lesquels vous avez besoin de soumettre des documents de conformité. Cliquez sur Afficher les exigences de conformité ci-dessous pour consulter la liste des produits concernés et soumettre les documents de conformité requis. Si vous ne soumettez pas les documents d’ici la date limite indiquée pour chaque produit mentionné sur la page en question, nous nous réservons le droit de supprimer les mises en vente concernées.
 Afficher les exigences de conformité
 Le tableau ci-dessous contient un échantillon des mises en vente concernées. Cliquez sur Afficher les exigences de conformité pour afficher toutes les mises en vente concernées.
 SKU ASIN État des produits mis en vente BL-CXJM00602 B0FBMLL7WH Risque de prélèvement BL-CXJM006003 B0FBMLL7WH Risque de prélèvement BL-CXJM0603 B0FBMMFXW7 Risque de prélèvement BL-CXJM0602 B0FBMMFXW7 Ris
Soumettez vos offres promotionnelles Prime Day 2026 le 24 mars ; mise à jour des frais et éligibilité
时间分组：last7 邮箱：account_1 发件人：L’équipe Amazon Services <donotreply@amazon.com> 日期：Mon, 23 Mar 2026 18:26:12 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:01:10
展开查看邮件预览 
96
 Préparez-vous à faire de ce Prime Day le meilleur que vous ayez jamais connu.
 Bonjour,
 Préparez-vous à faire de ce Prime Day le meilleur que vous ayez jamais connu. Nous avons apporté des modifications aux critères d’éligibilité aux offres promotionnelles afin de nous assurer que les promotions offrent la valeur à laquelle les clients s’attendent lors de nos événements d’achat les plus importants tels que le Prime Day. Nous avons également simplifié les frais liés aux promotions afin de mieux adapter vos coûts et avons fixé les dates de réception des produits FBA pour garantir que vos produits soient prêts pour Prime à l’approche de ce grand événement.
 Conditions d’éligibilité à la promotion
 Pour garantir que les offres promotionnelles proposent une valeur ajoutée aux clients, tout en renforçant leur engagement et augmentant vos ventes, les remises sur les prix et les offres promotionnelles exclusives Prime doivent désormais appliquer au moins 5 % de remise sur votre prix de vente le plus bas, y compris les prix promotionnels d’offres promotionnelles, de coupons et de remises sur les prix précédents, au cours des 30 derniers jours.
 Nous vous donnons également plus de temps
RE:[CASE 12253542122] 其他账户问题
时间分组：last7 邮箱：account_4 发件人："epr-de-weee-appeals-cn@amazon.com" <epr-de-weee-appeals-cn@amazon.com> 日期：Mon, 23 Mar 2026 06:15:50 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:00:27

你好，
感谢您与我们联系。
我们已审核该请求，并需要您提供更多详细信息才能解决此问题。我们注意到 ASIN 缺少尺寸
带组合 设备类型：小型设备（光伏面板除外）和品牌：Crifeton
请通过回复此消息分享以下内容：

欲了解更多信息，请访问：https://sellercentral-europe.amazon.com/help/hub/reference/G6SQMSCSKWJQEPJQ
感谢您在这一重要事项上的及时合作。
Freundliche Grüße
Bharath K.
Amazon Verkäuferservice
=======================================
BENÖTIGEN SIE WEITERE HILFE?

This is an email regarding FBA Offers for your Amazon Seller account. We are contacting you to let you know that you could be missing out on sales opportunities because of low/missing inventory for your ASIN offers in the attached sheet.
We recommend that you inbound additional inventory for your products immediately. To view the recommended replenishment quantity for these ASINs, go to “Restock inventory”:
https://sellercentral.amazon.ca/restockinventory/recommendations
Here is a sample of your high selling FBA ASINs, which are considered low in stock at the moment:

[Action Required]: Deactivated Listings due to “Active” Vacation status.
时间分组：last7 邮箱：account_4 发件人："fba-3p-buyability-improvement-ca@amazon.com" <fba-3p-buyability-improvement-ca@amazon.com> 日期：Sat, 21 Mar 2026 17:51:34 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:00:27
展开查看邮件预览 
Dear Selling Partner,
Greetings from Amazon.
We are reaching out to you to notify that you are missing out on sales opportunities as your listings are deactivated due to “Active” vacation status. If you are currently not on vacation, please update the status in seller central by clicking on the link below to activate all your listings.
https://sellercentral.amazon.ca/hz/sc/account-information
To continue sales when you are “On Vacation,” we recommend you to get onboarded to FBA Program. Here is the link to understand how FBA Program works and the process of enrolling yourselves to FBA program.
https://sellercentral.amazon.coma/fba/register/join-fba
If you need further help, please raise a case via contact us. - https://sellercentral.amazon.coma/cu/contact-us?ref=xx_ContactUs_xxxx_helphub
If you are not the correct point of contact, please re-direct this email to the person individual who manages your Amazon Seller account.
Thank you for selling in the Amazon store.
We hope you found this message to be useful. However, if you'd rather not receive future e-mails of this sort, please unsubscribe.

Review stranded inventory scheduled for automatic removal
时间分组：last7 邮箱：account_4 发件人：Fulfilment by Amazon stranded inventory <donotreply@amazon.com> 日期：Sat, 21 Mar 2026 11:04:36 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:00:28
展开查看邮件预览 
96
Fix stranded inventory
 Take action to prevent unnecessary removal of your stranded inventory
 Review stranded inventory scheduled for automatic removal
 You are receiving this message because you have stranded inventory in an Amazon fulfilment centre that is scheduled for automatic removal. For a full view of stranded units scheduled for automatic removal, visit the stranded inventory dashboard and sort by auto-removal date.
 Review stranded inventory
 Why is this happening?
 Inventory can be scheduled for automatic removal for a variety of reasons. In this case, the reason is that the inventory is stranded. Stranded inventory is inventory without a buyable offer and requires you to either reactivate the listing or remove the inventory.
 What happens if I don't take action?
 Your stranded inventory will be returned or disposed of based on the settings you selected on “Fix stranded inventory”. To customize your settings, go to Fix stranded inventory and select Edit automatic action settings.
 If you need more time to appeal or fix a stranded inventory issue, go to Fix stranded inventory and select Delay auto removal for 30 days from the drop-down menu for each listing.
 Report a

时间分组：last7 邮箱：account_3 发件人：Amazon Services <seller-notification@amazon.ca> 日期：Thu, 26 Mar 2026 16:14:53 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:00:06
展开查看邮件预览 
Greetings from Amazon Services.
 We have charged your credit card (Visa) for CDN$ 44.65 in an attempt to settle your Amazon.ca seller account balance.
 Note that the amount charged to your credit card may be less than the total amount you owe due to a credit limit imposed by your bank. If that is the case, we will continue to charge your card as often as every 24 hours until the remaining balance in your Amazon seller account is paid in full.
 You can also use the Make a Payment feature to repay the balance you owe. For details, go to seller Help, and search for “Make a Payment.”
 You can view your payment activity at any time by logging in to your seller account and going to your Payments Report.
 Thank you for selling on Amazon.ca.
 Amazon Services

Action required to Verify your Selling on Amazon Account
时间分组：last7 邮箱：account_1 发件人："Amazon Seller Central Notifications(Do Not Reply)" <donotreply@amazon.com> 日期：Tue, 24 Mar 2026 23:58:28 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:01:08
展开查看邮件预览 
96
 Hi,
 You're receiving this email because you recently applied to sell on Amazon or you recently reactivated your seller account.
 Maintaining a trusted marketplace for buyers and sellers is our top priority. Before you can start or resume Selling on Amazon, we ask that you go through a document verification and review process. Any existing listings for your account will be suspended while the review is in progress.
 Please follow the step-by-step instructions below to submit your documents for verification:
- Use below link to access the Seller Identity Verification process.
- Amazon North America
- Amazon Australia
- Follow the instructions provided as part of the Seller Identity Verification process to upload your documents, which our team will verify.
- Upon being successfully verified, you will be allowed to sell on Amazon.
- To start the verification for your account in United States, Mexico, Brazil or Canada, please use “Begin Verification in North America”.
- To start the verification for your account in Australia, Japan or Singapore, please use “Begin Verification in Australia”.
 Begin Verification in North America
 Begin Verification in Australia
 Sincerely,
 The Selli

 Hi,
 You're receiving this email because you recently applied to sell on Amazon or you recently reactivated your seller account.
 Maintaining a trusted marketplace for buyers and sellers is our top priority. Before you can start or resume Selling on Amazon, we ask that you go through a document verification and review process. Any existing listings for your account will be suspended while the review is in progress.
 Please follow the step-by-step instructions below to submit your documents for verification:
- Use below link to access the Seller Identity Verification process.
- Amazon North America
- Amazon Australia
- Follow the instructions provided as part of the Seller Identity Verification process to upload your documents, which our team will verify.
- Upon being successfully verified, you will be allowed to sell on Amazon.
- To start the verification for your account in United States, Mexico, Brazil or Canada, please use “Begin Verification in North America”.
- To start the verification for your account in Australia, Japan or Singapore, please use “Begin Verification in Australia”.

96
 Hi,
 You're receiving this email because you recently applied to sell on Amazon or you recently reactivated your seller account.
 Maintaining a trusted marketplace for buyers and sellers is our top priority. Before you can start or resume Selling on Amazon, we ask that you go through a document verification and review process. Any existing listings for your account will be suspended while the review is in progress.
 Please follow the step-by-step instructions below to submit your documents for verification:
- Use below link to access the Seller Identity Verification process.
- Amazon North America
- Amazon Australia
- Follow the instructions provided as part of the Seller Identity Verification process to upload your documents, which our team will verify.
- Upon being successfully verified, you will be allowed to sell on Amazon.
- To start the verification for your account in United States, Mexico, Brazil or Canada, please use “Begin Verification in North America”.
- To start the verification for your account in Australia, Japan or Singapore, please use “Begin Verification in Australia”.
 Begin Verification in North America
 Begin Verification in Australia
 Sincerely,
 The Selli
Your Amazon bank account information has been successfully updated
时间分组：last7 邮箱：account_2 发件人："Amazon.ca" <donotreply@amazon.com> 日期：Tue, 24 Mar 2026 23:44:31 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:01:36
展开查看邮件预览 
96
 Your Amazon bank account information has been successfully updated
 Hello from Amazon,
You have successfully modified the bank account information associated with your Seller account. This change will not affect any transfer of funds initiated prior to this change.
If this change involved adding a new bank account, your future transfers will be submitted to this new bank account. Please note that there is a mandatory three-day security hold before any changes to the bank account information take effect. Transfers of funds cannot be initiated until after that period, which starts on the date that you submit your new bank account information in your seller account.
If this change involved removing a bank account, the removal was successful and future transfers will be submitted to the bank account that is already associated with your seller account.
You can update your bank account information at any time in the Settings section of your seller account. For additional information, please visit our online help pages.
If you did not modify your bank account information, please contact Seller Support/Selling Partner Support .
Thank you for selling on Amazon,
Amazon Services
 Report a

FBA reimbursement notification
时间分组：last7 邮箱：account_3 发件人："Fulfillment by Amazon (Do not reply)" <donotreply@amazon.com> 日期：Mon, 23 Mar 2026 03:56:37 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:00:08
展开查看邮件预览 
96
FBA reimbursement notification
 You have a reimbursement activity
 Hello from Fulfilment by Amazon,
We have initiated a reimbursement, a reimbursement reversal, or both due to recent activity on your selling account. No action is required from you.
Reimbursements can be initiated for an issue that you notified us about or one that we identified at a fulfilment centre. A reimbursement reversal occurs when a reimbursement decision has been reviewed and changed. Reimbursement amounts are determined in accordance with the FBA inventory reimbursement policy ( https://sellercentral.amazon.co.uk/gp/help/external/200213130 ).
Please note that it may take up to five business days for reimbursement transactions to appear in your seller account.
You can find details on your reimbursement or reversal transaction in the Reimbursements report ( https://sellercentral.amazon.co.uk/reportcentral/REIMBURSEMENTS/0 ) in Seller Central:
- In the Event Date drop-down menu, select a date range and click Generate report . You can use the date in the subject line of this email as a point of reference.
- To identify inventory reimbursements and reversals, see the Quantity reimbursed [inventory] column.
-

96
 Hello Weihai US,
The following automated unfulfillable FBA removal orders have been created based on your automated settings.
 Removal order ID pVfzD86piw
 You can view the removals on Removal Order Details in your seller account by using the Search tool.
The next removal order will be created as scheduled on April 5, 2026 in accordance with your settings if you have unfulfillable inventory at that time.
To make changes to the shipping address, frequency of your automated unfulfillable removals, or other settings, go to Automated unfulfillable removal settings in your seller account.
 Thank you.

FBA reimbursement notification
时间分组：older 邮箱：account_4 发件人："Fulfillment by Amazon (Do not reply)" <donotreply@amazon.com> 日期：Wed, 18 Mar 2026 03:31:41 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:00:33
展开查看邮件预览 
96
FBA reimbursement notification
 You have a reimbursement activity
 Hello from Fulfilment by Amazon,
We have initiated a reimbursement, a reimbursement reversal, or both due to recent activity on your selling account. No action is required from you.
Reimbursements can be initiated for an issue that you notified us about or one that we identified at a fulfilment centre. A reimbursement reversal occurs when a reimbursement decision has been reviewed and changed. Reimbursement amounts are determined in accordance with the FBA inventory reimbursement policy ( https://sellercentral.amazon.co.uk/gp/help/external/200213130 ).
Please note that it may take up to five business days for reimbursement transactions to appear in your seller account.
You can find details on your reimbursement or reversal transaction in the Reimbursements report ( https://sellercentral.amazon.co.uk/reportcentral/REIMBURSEMENTS/0 ) in Seller Central:
- In the Event Date drop-down menu, select a date range and click Generate report . You can use the date in the subject line of this email as a point of reference.
- To identify inventory reimbursements and reversals, see the Quantity reimbursed [inventory] column.
-

Dear 深圳市翔悦鑫贸易有限公司,
As a valued Multi-Channel Fulfillment (MCF) managed customer, we are interested in learning about your program feedback including new features that may benefit your business. This may help us understand how we can better meet your business needs and continue to improve the customer experience. Please complete this survey no later than March 19.

This submission form is unique to your Seller account and can only be submitted once.
DISCLAIMER: Please do not include any Personally Identifiable Information within this survey such as physical addresses, phone numbers, merchant tokens, email addresses, account data, etc.
Thank you,
Your Multi-Channel Fulfillment Team

FBA reimbursement notification
 You have a reimbursement activity
 Hello from Fulfilment by Amazon,
We have initiated a reimbursement, a reimbursement reversal, or both due to recent activity on your selling account. No action is required from you.
Reimbursements can be initiated for an issue that you notified us about or one that we identified at a fulfilment centre. A reimbursement reversal occurs when a reimbursement decision has been reviewed and changed. Reimbursement amounts are determined in accordance with the FBA inventory reimbursement policy ( https://sellercentral.amazon.co.uk/gp/help/external/200213130 ).
Please note that it may take up to five business days for reimbursement transactions to appear in your seller account.
You can find details on your reimbursement or reversal transaction in the Reimbursements report ( https://sellercentral.amazon.co.uk/reportcentral/REIMBURSEMENTS/0 ) in Seller Central:

Important message about your Amazon seller account
时间分组：older 邮箱：account_4 发件人："Amazon Seller Central Notifications (Do Not Reply)" <donotreply@amazon.com> 日期：Fri, 13 Mar 2026 18:17:04 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:00:39
展开查看邮件预览 
96
 96
 Hello,
 Based on your Account Health Rating, your account is at risk of being deactivated. The Account Health Rating takes into account the following factors:
-
 The number of unresolved policy violations on your account at any given time
-
 The relative severity of those violations
-
 The extent to which you positively impact the customer experience via your selling activities
 We encourage you to address the violations on your Account Health page as soon as possible in order to prevent unnecessary disruption to your selling account.
 Why is this happening?
 There are unaddressed policy violations related to your selling account. It is your obligation to make sure that you adhere to Amazon’s policies. To learn more about the Account Health Rating and the policies within it, please visit the following: https://sellercentral.amazon.ae/performance/dashboard?ref=ah_em_composite .
 What can I do to avoid account deactivation?
 Addressing policy violations on your Account Health page in a timely manner will prevent unnecessary disruption to your selling account. You can view the violations in the Policy Compliance section of the Account Health page https://sellercentral.amazon.a

Balance Paid on your Amazon Seller Account / Paiement du solde de votre compte vendeur Amazon
时间分组：older 邮箱：account_3 发件人：Amazon Services <seller-notification@amazon.ca> 日期：Thu, 12 Mar 2026 16:15:06 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:00:10
展开查看邮件预览 
Greetings from Amazon Services.
 We have charged your credit card (Visa) for CDN$ 44.03 in an attempt to settle your Amazon.ca seller account balance.
 Note that the amount charged to your credit card may be less than the total amount you owe due to a credit limit imposed by your bank. If that is the case, we will continue to charge your card as often as every 24 hours until the remaining balance in your Amazon seller account is paid in full.
 You can also use the Make a Payment feature to repay the balance you owe. For details, go to seller Help, and search for “Make a Payment.”
 You can view your payment activity at any time by logging in to your seller account and going to your Payments Report.
 Thank you for selling on Amazon.ca.
 Amazon Services
 *****
 Bonjour d’Amazon Services,
 Nous avons débité votre carte bancaire (Visa) pour CDN$ 44.03 pour le règlement du solde de votre compte vendeur.
 Le montant débité sur votre carte bancaire peut être inférieur au montant total impayé si vous disposez d'une limite de crédit imposée par votre banque. Nous continuerons d'essayer de débiter votre carte bancaire toutes les 24 heures jusqu'à ce que le solde restant de votre compte soit e

96
FBA reimbursement notification
 You have a reimbursement activity
 Hello from Fulfillment by Amazon,
We have initiated a reimbursement, a reimbursement reversal, or both due to recent activity on your selling account. No action is required from you.
Reimbursements can be initiated for an issue that you notified us about or one that we identified at a fulfillment center. A reimbursement reversal occurs when a reimbursement decision has been reviewed and changed. Reimbursement amounts are determined in accordance with the FBA inventory reimbursement policy ( https://sellercentral.amazon.com/gp/help/external/200213130 ).
Please note that it may take up to five business days for reimbursement transactions to appear in your seller account.
You can find details on your reimbursement or reversal transaction in the Reimbursements report ( https://sellercentral.amazon.com/reportcentral/REIMBURSEMENTS/0 ) in Seller Central:
- In the Event Date drop-down menu, select a date range and click Generate report . You can use the date in the subject line of this email as a point of reference.
- To identify inventory reimbursements and reversals, see the Quantity reimbursed [inventory] column.
- T

Automated unfulfillable FBA inventory removal notification
时间分组：older 邮箱：account_3 发件人：Fulfillment by Amazon Operations <fba-noreply@amazon.com> 日期：Fri, 6 Mar 2026 17:16:27 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:00:14
展开查看邮件预览 
96
 Hello Weihai US,
The following automated unfulfillable FBA removal orders have been created based on your automated settings.
 Removal order ID UvRxALtvwM
 You can view the removals on Removal Order Details in your seller account by using the Search tool.
The next removal order will be created as scheduled on March 20, 2026 in accordance with your settings if you have unfulfillable inventory at that time.
To make changes to the shipping address, frequency of your automated unfulfillable removals, or other settings, go to Automated unfulfillable removal settings in your seller account.
 Thank you.
The Fulfillment by Amazon team
Please note: This email was sent from a notification-only address that cannot accept incoming email. Please do not reply to this email.
 Report an issue with this email
 If you have any questions visit: Seller Central

Important message about your Amazon seller account
时间分组：older 邮箱：account_1 发件人：Amazon <no-reply@amazon.it> 日期：Thu, 5 Mar 2026 12:05:50 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:01:25
展开查看邮件预览 
96
 Gentile partner di vendita,
Con la presente la informiamo di aver riscontrato che parte del suo inventario è stata contrassegnata come difettosa o invendibile perché non dispone di codici Transparency validi.
Transparency è un servizio di tracciamento a livello di articolo che aiuta a proteggere i clienti da unità contraffatte su Amazon. I codici Transparency vengono applicati a ogni singolo prodotto al momento della produzione da parte del produttore del marchio. Come comunicato in precedenza, si assicuri che i suoi prodotti dispongano dei codici Transparency prima di essere inviati ai centri logistici Amazon. Per maggiori informazioni sui requisiti dei codici a barre 2D Transparency e Transparency consulti:
https://sellercentral-europe.amazon.com/gp/help/G202008510
I dettagli degli ASIN interessati sono i seguenti:
Settimana 09 (02/22-02/28):
ASIN: B0FF27RPDR
Titolo： MzyxxelmagneticblockKUAN6-100
Numero di unità rifiutate presso i centri logistici： 40
Le chiediamo di creare un ordine di rimozione per restituirle le unità interessate. Per i dettagli, consulti il report sullo stato dell'inventario su Seller Central:
https://sellercentral-europe.amazon.com/gp/ssof/reports/search

96
FBA reimbursement notification
 You have a reimbursement activity
 Hello from Fulfillment by Amazon,
We have initiated a reimbursement, a reimbursement reversal, or both due to recent activity on your selling account. No action is required from you.
Reimbursements can be initiated for an issue that you notified us about or one that we identified at a fulfillment center. A reimbursement reversal occurs when a reimbursement decision has been reviewed and changed. Reimbursement amounts are determined in accordance with the FBA inventory reimbursement policy ( https://sellercentral.amazon.com/gp/help/external/200213130 ).
Please note that it may take up to five business days for reimbursement transactions to appear in your seller account.
You can find details on your reimbursement or reversal transaction in the Reimbursements report ( https://sellercentral.amazon.com/reportcentral/REIMBURSEMENTS/0 ) in Seller Central:
- In the Event Date drop-down menu, select a date range and click Generate report . You can use the date in the subject line of this email as a point of reference.
- To identify inventory reimbursements and reversals, see the Quantity reimbursed [inventory] column.
- T
Balance paid on your Amazon seller account
时间分组：older 邮箱：account_1 发件人：Amazon Services <seller-notification@amazon.com> 日期：Wed, 4 Mar 2026 13:13:50 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:01:26
展开查看邮件预览 
Greetings from Amazon Services.
 We have charged your credit card for $33.11 in an attempt to settle your Amazon seller account balance.
 Note that the amount charged to your credit card may be less than the total amount you owe due to a credit limit imposed by your bank. If that is the case, we will continue to charge your credit card as often as every 24 hours until the remaining balance in your Amazon seller account is paid in full.
 You can also use the Make a Payment feature to repay the balance you owe. For more information, see Making a Payment .
 You can view your payment activity at any time by logging in to your seller account and going to your Payments Report .
 Thank you for selling on Amazon.
 Amazon Services
 Help us improve your experience on selling on Amazon through this brief survey:
 https://amazonexteu.qualtrics.com/jfe/form/SV_eUKdboEQhg1YpuK?cID=10026600370-202603041233

展开查看邮件预览 
Greetings from Amazon Services.
 We have charged your credit card (Visa) for CDN$ 29.08 in an attempt to settle your Amazon.ca seller account balance.
 Note that the amount charged to your credit card may be less than the total amount you owe due to a credit limit imposed by your bank. If that is the case, we will continue to charge your card as often as every 24 hours until the remaining balance in your Amazon seller account is paid in full.
 You can also use the Make a Payment feature to repay the balance you owe. For details, go to seller Help, and search for “Make a Payment.”
 You can view your payment activity at any time by logging in to your seller account and going to your Payments Report.
 Thank you for selling on Amazon.ca.
 Amazon Services
 *****
 Bonjour d’Amazon Services,
 Nous avons débité votre carte bancaire (Visa) pour CDN$ 29.08 pour le règlement du solde de votre compte vendeur.
 Le montant débité sur votre carte bancaire peut être inférieur au montant total impayé si vous disposez d'une limite de crédit imposée par votre banque. Nous continuerons d'essayer de débiter votre carte bancaire toutes les 24 heures jusqu'à ce que le solde restant de votre compte soit e

Amazon Services
 96
 Update your VAT registration information to avoid impact on your account
 Hello,
Your VAT registration information in Seller Central needs to be updated to match the information included in Tax Authorities' database. Your account requires the following corrections:
 Country
 Seller Central information
 Tax Authorities' information
 Action needed to match Authorities' records
 France
 ??????????31?1?1-7-2 ??? ??? 442000 CN
 EUROPA VAT PARIS 10 RUE DE LA PAIX 75002 PARIS
 Update Address
 Note: You may land on a page which requires you to log into your Seller Central account using your credentials.
 Your submission will be reviewed within 72 hours, though some cases may take up to 14 days. We’ll contact you if additional information is needed.
 Note: updating your business’ information may trigger additional KYC verification.
 Why is this happening?
 We are taking this action because your VAT registration information in Seller Central doesn’t match the information included in Tax Authorities' database. Maintaining accurate VAT registration information is required to comply with European VAT Registration requirement . We leveraged a combination of automated means a

时间分组：older 邮箱：account_2 发件人："Dou, Zhaomeng" <doumeng@amazon.com> 日期：Thu, 19 Mar 2026 03:29:06 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:01:42
展开查看邮件预览 
[http://go.amazonsellerservices.com/l/229492/2022-02-24/7lj3v3m/229492/1645687216pC867bmZ/topbanner.png]
尊敬的亚马逊卖家：
我是亚马逊官方账户与运营经理Mengmeng，恭喜您成功完成账号注册，现邀您即刻上架开售，抓住新春销售机遇！
请立即扫码添加我的企业微信，领取以下福利
[cid:image005.jpg@01DCB793.7CAFBE00]
・         2026年欧洲新卖家开店礼包和优惠券，减免开店运营费用
・         2026年新卖家大欧洲拓展宝典，一站式解决欧洲开店所有疑难杂症（KYC审核/站点选择/税务合规/环境合规/产品合规/物流方案/选品技巧/快速出单诀窍等）
・         邀请进入亚马逊官方的欧洲站精英卖家交流群，与其他成功卖家交流经验、互通有无
・         帮助您提报参加2026年亚马逊旺季促销活动，解决提报过程中所有问题，快速提高销量和排名
← 立即扫描左侧二维码进行咨询
如何快速上线欧洲站?
为您推荐欧洲“完美FBA”物流解决方案！
亚马逊欧洲站有10大站点（英国 、 德国 、 法国 、 意大利 、 西班牙 、 荷兰 、 瑞典 、 波兰、比利时和爱尔兰），其中英国和德国的销售占比为70%，是订单最多、销售体量最大的两个站点。
因此，我们为您推荐 欧洲“完美FBA”物流解决方案来快速上线欧洲站：1) 发货至英国和欧盟（推荐德国），完成双边入仓；2) 在欧盟开启亚马逊欧洲物流整合服务（Pan-EU）：亚马逊将会根据智能算法预测您在其他国家的销量，将德国的部分库存免费智能调拨至其他国家。这样能帮助您的产品轻松销往欧盟九国，推动 新卖家首年销量增长约3-5倍！
[cid:image008.jpg@01DCB793.7CAFBE00]
通过“完美 FBA” ，您能将库存存放在离买家更近的运营中心，实现 1-2 天的配送时效（对比远程配送需 4-6天）。同时，欧盟一国入仓并加入 Pan-EU对比欧洲多国分别入仓， 头程费用更有优势且尾程仅需支付本地配送费，对比跨境配送， 尾程费用最高可节省 53%！
[https://m.media-amazon.com/images/G/28/email/buttonleftnew.png]
点击此处下载《欧洲完美FBA指南》<https://m.media-amazon.com/images/G/02/EU/EU_Perfect_FBA_Handbook.pdf>
[https://m.media-amazon.com/images/G/28/email/buttonrihgtnew.png]
如何完成欧洲站合规?
“欧洲完美合规指南”助您12周顺利上线大欧洲！
我们特推出结

尊敬的亚马逊卖家：
我是亚马逊官方账户与运营经理，负责扶持您的2026年亚马逊 欧洲站 店铺。请立即扫下方二维码添加我的企业微信，领取以下福利：
  1.  2026年欧洲新卖家的开店礼包和优惠券，减免开店运营费用。更有广告上千美金返还！
  2.  亚马逊官方耗时半年制作完成的2026年新卖家大欧洲拓展宝典，一站式解决欧洲开店所有疑难杂症（KYC审核/站点选择/税务合规/环境合规/产品合规/物流方案/选品技巧/快速出单诀窍等）。
  3.  邀请进入亚马逊官方的欧洲站精英卖家交流群，与其他成功卖家交流经验、互通有无。
  4.  帮助您提报参加2026年亚马逊旺季促销活动，节省上万促销提报费用
今后有任何店铺运营问题，请在微信上及时与我沟通解决，切勿拖延。
注意：我只负责扶持 您在2026年开始运营的亚马逊 欧洲站 店铺，您的其他站点店铺，仍然由其他经理负责。
[cid:image001.png@01DB815E.C5A86CE0]
使用亚马逊物流(FBA)配送商品——亚马逊欧洲站FBA新卖家福利，助力启航
[cid:image002.png@01DCAA6F.1C0DCAF0]
重大利好！亚马逊欧洲站费用下调
2026年亚马逊在欧洲站推出了有史以来最大规模的费用下调之一, 每件商品的费用将平均降低£0.15或€0.17。其中利好包括: 服装/配饰/维生素、矿物质及补充剂，家居用品（新分类）, 宠物服装和宠物食品/多个品类的销售佣金下调, 包裹配送费用下调, 低价商品FBA优惠费率扩至£20/€20, 促销费用更友好等。关于ASIN的销售佣金类别, 您可以通过【利润分析报告】查看每个 ASIN 的费用类别：路径：报告 > 销售成本和费用 > 利润分析 > 点击“120 天预测”标签 > 下载图表下方的报告。通过该报告，您可以快速识别每个 ASIN 的佣金类别，并确认哪些商品符合费用减免条件和计算佣金下调影响，具体可点此<https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s/-owu8NlHZmpNP4mO-3f4IA>查看
新卖家黄金90天！助力新ASIN获取更多曝光机会！
[cid:image003.png@01DCAA6F.1C0DCAF0]
顺颂商祺！
亚马逊全球开店
