Action Required: Website Suppressed ASINs
时间分组：older 邮箱：account_3 发件人："fba-3p-buyability-improvement-ca@amazon.com" <fba-3p-buyability-improvement-ca@amazon.com> 日期：Fri, 20 Mar 2026 21:10:27 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:00:08
展开查看邮件预览 
Dear Seller,
We are contacting you to let you know that you could be missing out on sales opportunities because of your incomplete listings.
We recommend you to submit the required documents to un-suppress your ASIN and activate your listings.
Here is a sample of your suppressed ASINs:
B0F13M1H6F, B0D97JS8WD
You can download the full list of your suppressed ASINs from the following path “Catalog” >> “Complete your drafts” >> “Completed with Issues” >> “Detail page removed”
https://sellercentral.amazon.ca/fixyourproducts/drafts
To upload the required documents or to appeal in-order to un-suppress the ASINs, please follow this path  login to your seller central account and go to “Performance” >> “Account Health”>> “Documentation Requests” under “Product Compliance request” on the right below corner >> “Provide documents” and choose to upload documents or to appeal.
 https://sellercentral.amazon.ca/performance/account/health/compliance-request
If you need further help, please raise a case via contact us. - https://sellercentral.amazon.ca/cu/contact-us?ref=xx_ContactUs_xxxx_helphub
If you are not the correct point of contact, please re-direct this email to the correct point of contact

https://sellercentral.amazon.ca/fixyourproducts/drafts
To upload the required documents or to appeal in-order to un-suppress the ASINs, please follow this path  login to your seller central account and go to “Performance” >> “Account Health”>> “Documentation Requests” under “Product Compliance request” on the right below corner >> “Provide documents” and choose to upload documents or to appeal.
 https://sellercentral.amazon.ca/performance/account/health/compliance-request

Action required: Your listings have been deactivated
时间分组：older 邮箱：account_4 发件人：Amazon Services <donotreply@amazon.com> 日期：Thu, 19 Mar 2026 13:07:43 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:00:30
展开查看邮件预览 
96
Dear seller,
We have deactivated the listings shown at the bottom of this email.
 Why is this happening?
We have taken this measure because we suspect your listing for this product infringes on the intellectual property of others. The listing of this product uses the protected copyright image of a rights owner on its product detail page. We have not been able to confirm that you are authorized to use this copyrighted image on the product detail page. Unauthorized use of copyright image is likely to cause confusion as to the source, endorsement or affiliation of the goods. Infringement of copyright is a violation of Amazon’s Intellectual Property Policy .
 How to address the listing violation?
To address your listing violation, click “Resolve” next to each affected ASIN in the Suspected Intellectual Property Violations section of your Account Health page . The violation, along with the name of the brand that owns the copyright image can be found under the “Reason” column on the Product Policy Compliance page.
To successfully appeal, you will need to submit the listing to Amazon for review after performing one of the following actions:
1. If the product is manufactured by the bran
SELLER: A3TG87V6ZG3WIX, ASIN: B0FF1QPD5B, MARKETPLACE: 6 - PS - DOC REVIEW

ご担当者様
平素はAmazon.co.jp をご利用いただき、ありがとうございます。
お問い合わせいただいた商品は当審査の対象外のため、販売継続とさせていただいております。特に追加の対応は必要ございません。
なお今後審査の対象になります場合には、別途ご連絡いたします。
Amazonでは販売パートナーの皆様とのコミュニケーションの質を向上させるため、1分ほどのアンケートへの協力をお願いしています。ぜひご回答をお願いいたします。
https://amazonexteu.qualtrics.com/jfe/form/SV_e2Pw4eFXjFviYfA?pm=UPSC&case=3263444313
引き続き弊社の製品安全プログラムへご協力をお願い申し上げます。
To help us continually improve, we ask that you take a moment to complete our survey below. This would help us understand your overall compliance experience.
Were you satisfied with the support provided?
If yes, please click here:
http://www.amazon.co.jp/gp/help/survey?p=A1MSA39KTZYOP3&k=hy
If no, please click here:
http://www.amazon.co.jp/gp/help/survey?p=A1MSA39KTZYOP3&k=hn
RE:[CASE 12228008522] 【需要采取行动】 - 波兰和爱尔兰的增值税合规支持
时间分组：older 邮箱：account_4 发件人："compliance-ops-mass-programs@amazon.com" <compliance-ops-mass-programs@amazon.com> 日期：Thu, 19 Mar 2026 05:53:17 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:00:32
展开查看邮件预览 
亲爱的卖家，
这是关于我们爱尔兰条款与条件重要更新的重要通知。
重要更正： 我们之前曾告知任何税务顾问都可用于爱尔兰增值税注册。这是一个错误。根据我们条款与条件的更新，现在只有以下税务顾问被接受用于爱尔兰增值税报销计划：
•AVASK
•J&P Accountants
•Taxually
•Expandly
•EURep
•EVatmaster
•VATAi
•Amber
如需了解更多信息，请阅读条款与条件：m.media-amazon.com/images/G/01/EU_COMPLIANCE_TEAM/IE_VAT_Terms_and_Conditions.pdf
添加您的税务信息
如需添加税务信息，请访问税务设置：sellercentral.amazon.com/tax/consolidatedRegistrations
**为什么需要增值税注册？**
欧盟税法要求使用FBA的卖家在库存存储的国家/地区注册增值税。亚马逊验证税务信息以遵守税务机关要求，并确保增值税准确应用于您的销售。
了解更多关于欧洲增值税注册要求的信息：sellercentral.amazon.com/help/hub/reference/GTQ23HPXBQK563WS
如有疑问，请通过您的案例日志联系我们：sellercentral.amazon.com/cu/case-lobby?ref_=xx_case_dnav_xx
如有疑问，请扫码加入亚马逊卖家合规群：
https://m.media-amazon.com/images/G/01/CN_Compliance_Team/mass_wecom_jm.jpg
Amazon Global Selling Seller Compliance Team

96
Ein oder mehrere Angebote wurden aus [Amazon.de] entfernt, bis die Kategorie genehmigt wird
 Ein oder mehrere Angebote wurden aus [Amazon.de] entfernt, bis die Kategorie genehmigt wird
 Amazon DE Angebote aufgrund von Freischaltungsvorschriften entfernt
 Guten Tag!
 Im Rahmen unserer fortlaufenden Bemühungen um ein optimales Einkaufserlebnis haben wir für den Verkauf bestimmter Produkte zusätzliche Freischaltungsvorschriften bzw. Angebotsbeschränkungen eingeführt. 2 Angebot(e) wurde(n) aufgrund von Anforderungen in Zusammenhang mit der Amazon-Richtlinie über Kategorien und Produkte mit Zulassungsbeschränkung entfernt. Dies hat keine Auswirkungen auf Ihre Verkäuferleistung.
 Sie können die betroffenen Angebote auf der Seite "Ihre Produkte korrigieren" in Seller Central in der Ansicht "Freischaltung erforderlich" überprüfen und die Freischaltung für diese Angebote beantragen. In einigen Fällen werden Anträge zum Verkauf bestimmter Produkte abgelehnt.
 Entfernte Angebote überprüfen Betroffene Angebote
 ASIN SKU B0DSB4L5QS XYXEUJIMU1072504 B0DSB4L5QS XYXEUJIMU1-1019-FBM
 Wurden Ihre Angebote irrtümlicherweise entfernt?
 Wenn Sie der Meinung sind, dass Ihre Produkte irrtümlich einer

时间分组：older 邮箱：account_4 发件人：Amazon Services <donotreply@amazon.com> 日期：Wed, 18 Mar 2026 15:14:33 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:00:32
展开查看邮件预览 
96
 Hello Xiangyuexin,
 Some of your listings have been deactivated due to missing mandatory compliance requirements for your products. Review the details and next steps below. The affected listings are shown at the end of this email.
 Why is this happening?
 We are taking this action because these products are missing mandatory compliance information. Review our Product safety and compliance help page for information on applicable laws, regulations, and Amazon policies. We leveraged a combination of automated means and expert human review to identify this issue and make this decision.
 The table at the end of this email provides product-specific compliance requirements.
 How do I reactivate my listings?
 To provide the required compliance information, go to your Account Health page and locate the product compliance requests:
-
 If you have the required documentation, follow the instructions to submit your compliance documents. We will only reinstate products that fulfill the compliance requirements.
-
 If you believe your products are exempt from these requirements, submit documentation demonstrating why they are not subject to these compliance requirements.
 For step-by-step inst

Submit product safety documentation to avoid listing deactivation
时间分组：older 邮箱：account_1 发件人：Amazon Services <donotreply@amazon.com> 日期：Wed, 18 Mar 2026 04:09:10 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:01:15
展开查看邮件预览 
96
 Hello ONLYFUN UK,
 Some of your listings are at risk of deactivation due to missing mandatory compliance requirements for your products. Review the details and next steps below. The affected listings are shown at the end of this email.
 Why is this happening?
 We are taking this action because these products are missing mandatory compliance information. Review our Product safety and compliance help page for information on applicable laws, regulations, and Amazon policies.
 The table at the end of this email provides product-specific compliance requirements.
 How do I reactivate my listings?
 To provide the required compliance information, go to your Account Health page and locate the product compliance requests:
-
 If you have the required documentation, follow the instructions to submit your compliance documents.
-
 If you believe your products are exempt from these requirements, submit documentation demonstrating why they are not subject to these compliance requirements.
 For step-by-step instructions, see our Submit compliance documents or appeal a documentation request help page.
 To avoid further impact to your account, close or delete any non-compliant listings that you d

RE:[CASE 12234581002] 亚马逊生产者责任延伸代付服务重视您的反馈
时间分组：older 邮箱：account_4 发件人："eu-compliance-operations@amazon.co.uk" <eu-compliance-operations@amazon.co.uk> 日期：Tue, 17 Mar 2026 20:14:25 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:00:33
展开查看邮件预览 
尊敬的卖家，
在亚马逊，我们一直在努力提高卖家使用亚马逊的”代付“服务完成生产者责任延伸(EPR)要求的体验。作为这项工作的一部分，我们非常感谢您能抽出几分钟时间参与简短的调查并提供反馈。 您的回复将完全保密。本调查由外部公司（Qualtrics）主办，只需要 2 到 3 分钟即可完成：
https://amazonexteu.qualtrics.com/jfe/form/SV_6xLwaujGStj0Knc?Q_CHL=gl&Q_DL=EMD_QnGLgpU8DlpFlBA_6xLwaujGStj0Knc_CGC_SnlhpkkLSSAP2Nz&_g_=g
您的反馈非常宝贵，我们在此先感谢您的支持，确保亚马逊持续优化服务，为您提供最佳体验以满足您的业务需求。
如果您对亚马逊代付服务有任何疑问，请不要直接回复此问题。您可以通过卖家支持创建新问题以获得及时回复。
如何联系卖家支持？请点击：https://sellercentral-europe.amazon.com/help/center
您的回复将受亚马逊服务欧洲隐私声明的约束(https://www.amazon.co.uk/gp/help/customer/display.html?ie=UTF8&nodeId=502584)。
Thank you for selling with Amazon.
Ashish S.
Amazon.co.uk Seller Support
=======================================
Interested in boosting sales? Try Fulfilment by Amazon (FBA): http://www.amazon.co.uk/FulfilmentByAmazon
MORE WAYS TO GET HELP:
Visit our seller forums for help from other sellers: https://sellercentral.amazon.co.uk/forums
Browse all Seller Help topics: http://sellercentral-europe.amazon.com/gp/help
To contact us again about this issue, please use the Contact Us form in Seller Central using the following link:
https://sellercentral-europe.amazon.com/cu/case-dashboard/view-case?caseID=12234581002
Please note: this e-mail was sent f
SELLER: A2G27MCX2FFLTJ, ASIN: B0GCDZTB93, MARKETPLACE: 771770 - PS - DOC REVIEW
时间分组：older 邮箱：account_2 发件人："pa-toys-mx@amazon.com.mx" <pa-toys-mx@amazon.com.mx> 日期：Tue, 17 Mar 2026 18:18:26 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:01:43
展开查看邮件预览 
Hello,
We reviewed the documents provided for ASIN B0GCDZTB93, including Test Report, and still have unmet compliance requirements. If you do not provide the requested information, your ability to list these products will be impacted.
The document or image submitted is missing the following requirements:
- ASTM F963-17 or -23, CPSIA and Magnet Hazard Warning or 16 CFR 1262 Safety Standard for Magnets or
- NOM-252-SSA1-2011 or
- SOR/2011-17
Without completing the steps mentioned above we will not be able to proceed with your document review. This case now will be closed but we welcome you to re-open this case as soon as you are able to provide the required compliance documents.
Product Safety Team
To help us continually improve, we ask that you take a moment to complete our survey below. This would help us understand your overall compliance experience.
Were you satisfied with the support provided?
If yes, please click here:
http://www.amazon.mx/gp/help/survey?p=A17V8H93FRIDBW&k=hy
If no, please click here:
http://www.amazon.mx/gp/help/survey?p=A17V8H93FRIDBW&k=hn

Hello,
We reviewed the documents provided for ASIN B0GCFTLMVD, including Certificates, and still have unmet compliance requirements. If you do not provide the requested information, your ability to list these products will be impacted.
We noticed that the model number in the Certificate does not match with the model number CMJY06 in the Detail Page
To continue with the approval process for your product, please submit test report with the correct information, including product identifier which show that the product is the same when compared to the product details on the detail page.
For information on our compliance requirements, see our help page at
https://sellercentral.amazon.com.mx/help/hub/reference/external/GXMGGPL6LC4CVXHT?locale=en-US
Without completing the steps mentioned above we will not be able to proceed with your document review. This case now will be closed but we welcome you to re-open this case as soon as you are able to provide the required compliance documents.

Were you satisfied with the
RE:[CASE 12212259122] NL - Food and Product Safety - ASIN: B0DSB4L5QS
时间分组：older 邮箱：account_4 发件人："no-reply@amazon.nl" <no-reply@amazon.nl> 日期：Tue, 17 Mar 2026 13:36:20 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:00:34
展开查看邮件预览 
Hello from Amazon Selling Partner Support,
Thank you for contacting us. We understand that you needed assistance with reinstating your ASIN B0DSB4L5QS on Poland, the Netherlands, Sweden, and Belgium.
We have submitted the reinstatement request on your behalf and are happy to share the following updates:
Your ASIN has been successfully reinstated on the Poland (PL), the Netherlands (NL), and Belgium (BE) marketplaces. Please allow a few hours for the changes to fully take effect on the detail pages.
Regarding the Sweden (SE) marketplace, upon checking, your ASIN is already active and available for sale. You can verify this through the following link: https://www.amazon.se/dp/B0DSB4L5QS
Additionally, we have confirmed that there are currently no restrictions on your ASIN on the Netherlands (NL) marketplace. However, please note that if your product still does not recover after a few hours on certain marketplaces, this may indicate that there are other restrictions affecting your listing on those specific sites. In that case, we would recommend that you open a new case directly on the corresponding marketplace for further investigation, as the support team on each site will have bette

您好！

欢迎向亚马逊提交反馈，从而帮助亚马逊改善您的开店体验。

RE:[CASE 12204192612] PL - Food and Product Safety - ASIN: B0DSB4L5QS
时间分组：older 邮箱：account_4 发件人：Amazon Seller Support <merch.service05@amazon.pl> 日期：Mon, 16 Mar 2026 10:24:33 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:00:35
展开查看邮件预览 
尊敬的销售伙伴：您好！
我们了解到，由于产品安全问题，您的 ASIN：B0DSB4L5QS 已被删除，您已提供所需的文件并想要恢复您的ASIN。
我们已审核您提交的文件，但目前提供的文件不足以恢复您的商品销售权限。
根据恢复请求的要求，我们仍然缺少以下内容：
产品和/或包装的图片，显示强制性标记：缺少波兰站点所需的年龄警告标识。相关文件必须以PDF/ZIP格式提交。
欢迎向亚马逊提交反馈，从而帮助亚马逊改善您的开店体验。
您对我们提供的支持是否满意？
如果是，请单击此处
https://sellercentral-europe.amazon.com/hz/case-dashboard/hmd?p=A1SQ8JWDB6LL3Q&c=12204192612&k=hy
如果否，请单击此处
https://sellercentral-europe.amazon.com/hz/case-dashboard/hmd?p=A1SQ8JWDB6LL3Q&c=12204192612&k=hn
Thank you for selling with Amazon.
Mohd Arif K.

RE:[CASE 12228008522] 【需要采取行动】 - 波兰和爱尔兰的增值税合规支持
时间分组：older 邮箱：account_4 发件人："compliance-ops-mass-programs@amazon.com" <compliance-ops-mass-programs@amazon.com> 日期：Mon, 16 Mar 2026 02:10:21 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:00:35
展开查看邮件预览 
尊敬的卖家：
这是来自亚马逊的合规通知。
根据欧盟税法，您需要在波兰和爱尔兰注册增值税。
为了帮助您承担合规成本，亚马逊提供财务支持：
**爱尔兰（IE）：**
- €1,250报销，涵盖增值税注册 + 2年申报服务 + 财务代理（如适用）
- 接受任何增值税服务提供商
- 在卖家平台提交增值税号的截止日期：2026年6月30日
如需了解更多信息，请阅读条款与条件：https://m.media-amazon.com/images/G/01/CN_Compliance_Team/IE_VAT_Promo_Terms_and_Conditions_CN_2026.pdf
**波兰（PL）：**
- €500报销（非欧盟卖家）或€800（欧盟注册卖家）
- 涵盖增值税注册 + 1年申报服务 + 税务代表费用（如适用）
- 接受任何增值税服务提供商
- 在卖家平台提交增值税号的截止日期：2026年5月30日
如需了解更多信息，请阅读条款与条件：https://m.media-amazon.com/images/G/01/CN_Compliance_Team/PLSE_VAT_Promo_Terms_and_Conditions_CN.pdf
---
**添加您的税务信息**
如需添加税务信息，请访问税务设置：sellercentral.amazon.com/tax/consolidatedRegistrations
**为什么需要注册增值税？**
欧盟税法要求使用FBA的卖家在库存存储的国家注册增值税。亚马逊验证税务信息以符合税务机关要求，并确保准确地对您的销售征收增值税。
了解更多关于欧洲增值税注册要求的信息：sellercentral.amazon.com/help/hub/reference/GTQ23HPXBQK563WS
如有疑问，请通过您的案例日志联系我们：sellercentral.amazon.com/cu/case-lobby?ref_=xx_case_dnav_xx
此促销活动仅限收件人本人使用，不得转让、分配、转发或以其他方式提供给任何其他卖家。更多详情，请参阅条款与条件。
如有疑问，请扫码加入亚马逊卖家合规群：
https://m.media-amazon.com/images/G/01/CN_Compliance_Team/mass_wecom_jm.jpg

B0DSB3S7L2
B0DSB5BPVM
B0F74DV4WN

SKUs ohne aktive Angebote, die für eine automatische Remission vorgesehen sind
时间分组：older 邮箱：account_4 发件人：Versand durch Amazon <donotreply@amazon.com> 日期：Sun, 15 Mar 2026 14:27:36 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:00:36
展开查看邮件预览 
96
SKUs ohne aktive Angebote, die für eine automatische Remission vorgesehen sind
 Guten Tag!
 Sie erhalten diese Nachricht, da Sie Lagerbestand ohne aktive Angebote in einem Amazon Logistikzentrum haben, der für automatische Remission vorgemerkt ist. Bei Lagerbestand ohne aktive Angebote handelt es sich um Lagerbestand, der nicht verkauft werden kann, da kein entsprechendes Angebot vorhanden ist. Sie müssen daher das Angebot erneut aktivieren oder den Lagerbestand entfernen.
 Mit Stand vom 2026-03-15 haben Sie 1 neue SKUs ohne aktive Angebote, für die eine automatische Remission vorgesehen ist. Die ersten 50 dieser SKUs sind unten aufgeführt. Möglicherweise sind weitere Einheiten für eine automatische Remission aus früheren E-Mail-Benachrichtigungen vorgesehen. Eine vollständige Übersicht der Einheiten, die für eine automatische Remission vorgesehen sind, finden Sie unter Lagerbestand ohne aktive Angebote bearbeiten . Sortieren Sie auf der Seite nach Datum der automatischen Remission .
 Je nachdem, welche Einstellungen Sie auf der Seite Lagerbestand ohne aktive Angebote bearbeiten ausgewählt haben, wird Ihr Lagerbestand entweder zurückgesendet oder entsorgt. Wenn Sie keine Einstel
Einhaltung der Compliance-Anforderungen für Ihre Angebote
时间分组：older 邮箱：account_2 发件人："Benachrichtigungen von Amazon Seller Central (nicht antworten)" <donotreply@amazon.com> 日期：Sun, 15 Mar 2026 13:31:58 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:01:44
展开查看邮件预览 
96
Maßnahme erforderlich: Wichtige Informationen zu Ihren Produktangeboten
 Wir wenden uns an Sie, da Sie Produkte anbieten, für die Sie bestimmte Compliance-Unterlagen übermitteln müssen.
 Für Produktangebote fehlen erforderliche Unterlagen zur Compliance.
 Guten Tag!
 Wir wenden uns an Sie, da Sie Produkte anbieten, für die Sie bestimmte Konformitätsunterlagen übermitteln müssen. Klicken Sie unten auf "Compliance-Anforderungen überprüfen", um die Liste der betroffenen Produkte zu sehen und die erforderlichen Unterlagen einzureichen. Wenn Sie die erforderlichen Unterlagen nicht bis zum jeweils angegebenen Termin übermitteln, können wir die betroffenen Angebote entfernen.
 Compliance-Anforderungen überprüfen
 Die folgende Tabelle enthält eine Auswahl Ihrer betroffenen Angebote. Klicken Sie auf "Compliance-Anforderungen überprüfen", um alle Ihre betroffenen Angebote anzuzeigen.
 SKU ASIN Angebotsstatus BL-CXJM0602 B0FBMMFXW7 Remissionsgefährdet BL-CXJM006003 B0FBMLL7WH Remissionsgefährdet BL-CXJM00602 B0FBMLL7WH Remissionsgefährdet
 Was ist der Grund?
Diese Anforderung trägt dazu bei, dass Produkte den lokalen Gesetzen entsprechen und für Kunden sicher sind.
 Wie kann ich die betrof
Rispondi ai requisiti di conformità per le tue offerte
时间分组：older 邮箱：account_2 发件人："Notifiche di Amazon Seller Central (non rispondere)" <donotreply@amazon.com> 日期：Sun, 15 Mar 2026 13:31:56 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:01:44
展开查看邮件预览 
96
Azione richiesta: Informazioni importanti sulle sue offerte
 La contattiamo perché ha pubblicato offerte di prodotti che richiedono l'invio di documenti di conformità.
 Le offerte dei prodotti sono prive dei documenti di conformità obbligatori
 Buongiorno,
 ti contattiamo perché hai pubblicato offerte di prodotti che richiedono l'invio di documenti di conformità. Clicca su Visualizza requisiti di conformità qui sotto per accedere all'elenco dei prodotti interessati e inviare i documenti di conformità richiesti. Se non invierai i documenti entro il termine indicato per ciascun prodotto, le offerte di tali prodotti potrebbero essere rimosse.
 Visualizza requisiti di conformità
 La tabella seguente contiene un campione delle offerte interessate. Clicca su Visualizza requisiti di conformità per accedere all'elenco completo.
 SKU ASIN Stato delle offerte BL-CXJM0602 B0FBMMFXW7 A rischio di rimozione BL-CXJM00602 B0FBMLL7WH A rischio di rimozione BL-CXJM006003 B0FBMLL7WH A rischio di rimozione
 Perché succede questo?
L'aderenza ai requisiti contribuisce a garantire che i prodotti siano conformi alle leggi locali e non rappresentino un rischio per i clienti.
 Come faccio a continuare a

RE:[CASE 12212259122] NL - Food and Product Safety - ASIN: B0DSB4L5QS
时间分组：older 邮箱：account_4 发件人："no-reply@amazon.nl" <no-reply@amazon.nl> 日期：Sun, 15 Mar 2026 10:15:44 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:00:36
展开查看邮件预览 
Hello from Amazon Selling Partner Support,
We have reviewed the documentation you provided in pac-nl.pdf for ASIN B0DSB4L5QS reinstatement.
The materials you submitted meet the requirements for the NL (Netherlands) marketplace. Your pac-nl.pdf contains the product packaging images showing the Dutch product name "MAGNETISCHE BLOKKEN", Dutch warning label "WAARSCHUWING", complete safety warnings including choking and magnetic hazards in Dutch, age marking 3+, CE marking, manufacturer information, and "GEMAAKT IN CHINA" marking.
However, to reinstate your selling privileges in the remaining markets (PL/SE/BE/IT), we still need age warning marks with mandatory markings in the appropriate national languages for each target country:
- PL (Poland): Product or packaging images showing age warnings in Polish
- SE (Sweden): Product or packaging images showing age warnings in Swedish
- BE (Belgium): Product or packaging images showing age warnings in Dutch/French
- IT (Italy): Product or packaging images showing age warnings in Italian
Please submit all documents in PDF or ZIP format. Once you provide the language-specific packaging images for these markets, we can proceed with the reinstatem

RE:[CASE 3264768333] New listing appeal/dispute submission for merchant [A1PWCIMAHQJUWJ] in marketplace [A39IBJ37TRP1C6]
时间分组：older 邮箱：account_4 发件人："pars-rp-core-sellerappeals-hvl@amazon.com.au" <pars-rp-core-sellerappeals-hvl@amazon.com.au> 日期：Sun, 15 Mar 2026 09:12:15 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:00:36
展开查看邮件预览 
Dear Seller,
For ASIN - B0CN95SQ6J
This queue has been incorrectly assigned to your product, and we sincerely apologize for any inconvenience this may have caused.
Moving forward, please make sure to use the Product Compliance cases to submit or appeal your requests. To do so, follow these steps:
1.	Go to the Performance tab and select Account Health.
2.	Under Manage your compliance in the bottom right-hand corner, click Product compliance requests.
3.	Click Add or appeal compliance for the product you are taking action on.
4.	Select Appeal Request and choose the appeal reason.
5.	Click Submit to send your submission for review.
We truly appreciate your understanding and cooperation.
Best regards,
Amazon Compliance Team
========================================================================================================
 Hello ,
We received your submission for the following ASINs and we have determined that there are currently no restrictions on the listings. The following listings are active on the Amazon.com.au store:
ASIN: B0DQ56DF7Q, B0FB9MPZMZ, B0FBGHLBCK
We're here to help
-- For more information on restricted products, go to "Restricted products":
https://sellercentral.am

96
Åtgärd krävs: Viktig information angående dina produktposter
 Vi kontaktar dig eftersom du har publicerat produkter som du måste skicka in dokument om överensstämmelse för.
 Produktposterna saknar dokument om överensstämmelse
 Hej!
 Vi kontaktar dig eftersom du har publicerat produkter för vilka du måste skicka in dokument om överensstämmelse. Klicka på Granska krav på överensstämmelse nedan om du vill visa listan med berörda produkter och skicka sedan in de dokument om överensstämmelse som krävs. Om du inte skickar in dokumenten senast det angivna förfallodatumet för respektive produkt i den här länken, så kan vi komma att ta bort de berörda produktposterna.
 Visa krav på överensstämmelse
 I tabellen nedan visas en av dina berörda produktposter som exempel. Klicka på Granska krav på överensstämmelse om du vill se alla dina berörda produktposter.
 SKU ASIN Status BL-CXJM00602 B0FBMLL7WH Riskerar borttagning BL-CXJM006003 B0FBMLL7WH Riskerar borttagning
 Varför händer det här?
Det här kravet hjälper till att säkerställa att produkterna är säkra för kunderna och överensstämmer med lokala lagar.
 Vad behöver jag göra om jag vill fortsätta att sälja de här produkterna?
Klicka på Gra

Maßnahme erforderlich: Wichtige Informationen zu Ihren Produktangeboten
 Wir wenden uns an Sie, da Sie Produkte anbieten, für die Sie bestimmte Compliance-Unterlagen übermitteln müssen.
 Für Produktangebote fehlen erforderliche Unterlagen zur Compliance.
 Guten Tag!
 Wir wenden uns an Sie, da Sie Produkte anbieten, für die Sie bestimmte Konformitätsunterlagen übermitteln müssen. Klicken Sie unten auf "Compliance-Anforderungen überprüfen", um die Liste der betroffenen Produkte zu sehen und die erforderlichen Unterlagen einzureichen. Wenn Sie die erforderlichen Unterlagen nicht bis zum jeweils angegebenen Termin übermitteln, können wir die betroffenen Angebote entfernen.
 Compliance-Anforderungen überprüfen
 Die folgende Tabelle enthält eine Auswahl Ihrer betroffenen Angebote. Klicken Sie auf "Compliance-Anforderungen überprüfen", um alle Ihre betroffenen Angebote anzuzeigen.
 SKU ASIN Angebotsstatus BL-CXJM0603 B0FBMMFXW7 Remissionsgefährdet
 Was ist der Grund?
Diese Anforderung trägt dazu bei, dass Produkte den lokalen Gesetzen entsprechen und für Kunden sicher sind.
 Wie kann ich die betroffenen Produkte weiterhin verkaufen?
Klicken Sie auf "Compliance-Anforderungen überprüfen"
Rispondi ai requisiti di conformità per le tue offerte
时间分组：older 邮箱：account_2 发件人："Notifiche di Amazon Seller Central (non rispondere)" <donotreply@amazon.com> 日期：Sat, 14 Mar 2026 13:30:33 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:01:45
展开查看邮件预览 
96
Azione richiesta: Informazioni importanti sulle sue offerte
 La contattiamo perché ha pubblicato offerte di prodotti che richiedono l'invio di documenti di conformità.
 Le offerte dei prodotti sono prive dei documenti di conformità obbligatori
 Buongiorno,
 ti contattiamo perché hai pubblicato offerte di prodotti che richiedono l'invio di documenti di conformità. Clicca su Visualizza requisiti di conformità qui sotto per accedere all'elenco dei prodotti interessati e inviare i documenti di conformità richiesti. Se non invierai i documenti entro il termine indicato per ciascun prodotto, le offerte di tali prodotti potrebbero essere rimosse.
 Visualizza requisiti di conformità
 La tabella seguente contiene un campione delle offerte interessate. Clicca su Visualizza requisiti di conformità per accedere all'elenco completo.
 SKU ASIN Stato delle offerte BL-CXJM0603 B0FBMMFXW7 A rischio di rimozione
 Perché succede questo?
L'aderenza ai requisiti contribuisce a garantire che i prodotti siano conformi alle leggi locali e non rappresentino un rischio per i clienti.
 Come faccio a continuare a vendere i prodotti interessati?
Clicca su Visualizza requisiti di conformità per ottenere magg

时间分组：older 邮箱：account_4 发件人："pars-rp-core-sellerappeals-hvl@amazon.com.au" <pars-rp-core-sellerappeals-hvl@amazon.com.au> 日期：Sat, 14 Mar 2026 11:36:48 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:00:38
展开查看邮件预览 
Hello ,
We received your submission and after careful review we have determined that your ASINs do not meet the criteria for reinstatement.
Why did this happen?
Your listings do not meet our standards. Refer to the following details:
ASIN: B0FBL3FD87 B0FBL2NZ14 B0F74J7N8D B0DSB3S7L2 B0DSB5BPVM B0F74DV4WN
This product has been identified as a small, high-powered magnet or magnet set, which is prohibited for sale in the Amazon Australia store. Please refer to our Restricted Products Help Page for more information: <a href="https://sellercentral.amazon.com.au/gp/help/help.html?itemID=200164570&referral=A2UPM27VJXKC7P_A3T8UMQ0A1559X">https://sellercentral.amazon.com.au/gp/help/help.html?itemID=200164570&referral=A2UPM27VJXKC7P_A3T8UMQ0A1559X</a>
You can access the previous communication sent to you in regards to this matter via the "Performance notifications" page in the "Performance" section of Seller Central:
https://sellercentral.amazon.com.au/gp/customer-experience/perf-notifications.html
We're here to help
For information on our policies, you can go to the following pages:
-- "Restricted products":
https://sellercentral.amazon.com.au/gp/help/200164330?referral=A2UPM27VJXKC7P_A3T8U
Einhaltung der Compliance-Anforderungen für Ihre Angebote
时间分组：older 邮箱：account_1 发件人："Benachrichtigungen von Amazon Seller Central (nicht antworten)" <donotreply@amazon.com> 日期：Sat, 14 Mar 2026 11:10:15 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:01:16
展开查看邮件预览 
96
Maßnahme erforderlich: Wichtige Informationen zu Ihren Produktangeboten
 Wir wenden uns an Sie, da Sie Produkte anbieten, für die Sie bestimmte Compliance-Unterlagen übermitteln müssen.
 Für Produktangebote fehlen erforderliche Unterlagen zur Compliance.
 Guten Tag!
 Wir wenden uns an Sie, da Sie Produkte anbieten, für die Sie bestimmte Konformitätsunterlagen übermitteln müssen. Klicken Sie unten auf "Compliance-Anforderungen überprüfen", um die Liste der betroffenen Produkte zu sehen und die erforderlichen Unterlagen einzureichen. Wenn Sie die erforderlichen Unterlagen nicht bis zum jeweils angegebenen Termin übermitteln, können wir die betroffenen Angebote entfernen.
 Compliance-Anforderungen überprüfen
 Die folgende Tabelle enthält eine Auswahl Ihrer betroffenen Angebote. Klicken Sie auf "Compliance-Anforderungen überprüfen", um alle Ihre betroffenen Angebote anzuzeigen.
 SKU ASIN Angebotsstatus LJY-YYFGQ B0B7WMLTVP Entfernt
 Was ist der Grund?
Diese Anforderung trägt dazu bei, dass Produkte den lokalen Gesetzen entsprechen und für Kunden sicher sind.
 Wie kann ich die betroffenen Produkte weiterhin verkaufen?
Klicken Sie auf "Compliance-Anforderungen überprüfen", um weitere
Rispondi ai requisiti di conformità per le tue offerte
时间分组：older 邮箱：account_1 发件人："Notifiche di Amazon Seller Central (non rispondere)" <donotreply@amazon.com> 日期：Sat, 14 Mar 2026 11:10:09 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:01:16
展开查看邮件预览 
96
Azione richiesta: Informazioni importanti sulle sue offerte
 La contattiamo perché ha pubblicato offerte di prodotti che richiedono l'invio di documenti di conformità.
 Le offerte dei prodotti sono prive dei documenti di conformità obbligatori
 Buongiorno,
 ti contattiamo perché hai pubblicato offerte di prodotti che richiedono l'invio di documenti di conformità. Clicca su Visualizza requisiti di conformità qui sotto per accedere all'elenco dei prodotti interessati e inviare i documenti di conformità richiesti. Se non invierai i documenti entro il termine indicato per ciascun prodotto, le offerte di tali prodotti potrebbero essere rimosse.
 Visualizza requisiti di conformità
 La tabella seguente contiene un campione delle offerte interessate. Clicca su Visualizza requisiti di conformità per accedere all'elenco completo.
 SKU ASIN Stato delle offerte LJY-YYFGQ B0B7WMLTVP Rimosse
 Perché succede questo?
L'aderenza ai requisiti contribuisce a garantire che i prodotti siano conformi alle leggi locali e non rappresentino un rischio per i clienti.
 Come faccio a continuare a vendere i prodotti interessati?
Clicca su Visualizza requisiti di conformità per ottenere maggiori informazioni

如果您遇到任何问题,请回复我们并提供屏幕截图。
欢迎向亚马逊提交反馈，从而帮助亚马逊改善您的开店体验。
您对我们提供的支持是否满意？

如果否，请单击此处
https://sellercentral-europe.amazon.com/hz/case-dashboard/hmd?p=A7SYBYD7FPKJ5&c=12204192612&k=hn
感谢您选择 Amazon 作为销售平台。
Navin K.

Important message: your account is at risk of deactivation
时间分组：older 邮箱：account_2 发件人："Amazon Seller Central notifications (do not reply)" <donotreply@amazon.com> 日期：Sat, 14 Mar 2026 05:30:05 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:01:45
展开查看邮件预览 
96
 96
 Hello,
 Based on your Account Health Rating, your account is at risk of being deactivated. The Account Health Rating takes into account factors such as:
-
 The number of unresolved policy violations on your account at any given time
-
 The degree to which the violation negatively affects the customer experience
-
 Whether the violation contravenes applicable laws and regulations
 We encourage you to address the violations on your Account Health page as soon as possible in order to prevent unnecessary disruption to your selling account.
 Why is this happening?
 There are unaddressed policy violations related to your selling account. It is your obligation to make sure that you adhere to Amazon’s policies. To learn more about the Account Health Rating and the policies within it, please visit the following: https://sellercentral.amazon.com.au/performance/dashboard?ref=ah_em_composite .
 What can I do to avoid account deactivation?
 Addressing policy violations on your Account Health page in a timely manner will prevent unnecessary disruption to your selling account. You can view the violations in the Policy compliance section of the Account Health page https://sellercentral.ama
Angebote, die bei Amazon.de aufgrund fehlender Registrierungsnummern für Verpackungen deaktiviert wurden
时间分组：older 邮箱：account_1 发件人：Amazon EU <donotreply@amazon.com> 日期：Fri, 13 Mar 2026 23:23:04 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:01:16
展开查看邮件预览 
96
 Guten Tag Li Jianyong!
 Einige Ihrer Angebote bei Amazon.de wurden deaktiviert, da für die Verpackung Informationen zur Einhaltung der Richtlinien für die erweiterte Herstellerverantwortung fehlen. Überprüfen Sie Ihre betroffenen Angebote und die nächsten Schritte unten.
 Beispiele für Ihre betroffenen Angebote finden Sie unten. Die vollständige Liste finden Sie auf der Seite "Verkäuferleistung".
 ASIN
 SKU
 Titel
 Gefährdete Verkäufe
 B0BBLH6GLZ
 LJY-YEYYD
 ONLYFUN Baby Spielzeug 1 Jahr, Spielzeug ab 1 2 3 Jahre, kinderspielzeug ab 1 2 Jahre, Nachtlicht Kinder Baby, Baby Geschenk Junge Mädchen, Geschenk 1 Jahr Junge Mädchen, Sensorik Spielzeug
 Unbekannt
 Warum ist das so?
 Für den Verkauf von Produkten mit Verpackung in Deutschland sind gültige Registrierungsnummern erforderlich. Ihre Angebote müssen gültige Registrierungsnummern haben, um den deutschen Verpackungsrichtlinien zu entsprechen. Dies schließt alle Arten von Produktverpackungen ein, die beim Endverbraucher landen, wie z. B. Einzelhandelsverpackungen, Versandmaterialien und alle zusätzlichen Verpackungskomponenten wie Etiketten oder Klebeband.
 Detaillierte Anforderungen finden Sie auf der Hilfeseite EPR-Anforderun
[Case ID:12212259122]"Your Help Needed" NL - Food and Product Safety - ASIN: B0DSB4L5QS
时间分组：older 邮箱：account_4 发件人："no-reply@amazon.nl" <no-reply@amazon.nl> 日期：Fri, 13 Mar 2026 20:32:53 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:00:39
展开查看邮件预览 
Dit is om je er aan te herinneren dat we meer informatie nodig hebben om je case op te lossen. Als je nog steeds hulp nodig hebt, reageer dan op dit bericht en verstrek de gegevens die we hieronder hebben aangevraagd.
Als we je probleem hebben opgelost, is er geen verdere actie nodig en sluiten we je case.
Amazon-ondersteuning
-- Original Message --
Hello from Amazon Selling Partner Support!
We've completed our review of your ASIN B0DSB4L5QS appeal that your selling privileges need to be restored due to product safety issues.
After review, we have successfully reinstated your ASIN B0DSB4L5QS selling privileges in the following markets: DE (Germany), FR (France), ES (Spain), IE (Ireland), UK (UK), and MEA and TR markets.
If you wish to resume selling privileges in the NL (Netherlands), PL (Poland), SE (Sweden), BE (Belgium), and IT (Italy) markets, please provide an age warning mark (product or packaging image showing mandatory marking: age warning in the language of the appropriate country) that compliant the requirements of the target sales country.
Please note that all documents must be submitted in PDF or ZIP format.
Thank you for your cooperation.
To help us continually improve
Your Amazon.com Inventory - Action Required
时间分组：older 邮箱：account_2 发件人：Fulfillment by Amazon Operations <fba-noreply@amazon.com> 日期：Fri, 13 Mar 2026 17:23:15 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:01:46
展开查看邮件预览 
Dear Bailian Direct,
We have recently restricted listings for the product(s) listed below on Amazon.com.
Please initiate a removal request for the ASIN(s) referenced below to have your inventory sent to a location of your choosing. If this inventory is not removed within 30 days of this notification (by 04/11/2026), we may dispose of it in accordance with FBA policies.
Thank you for your attention to this matter.
Regards,
Product Safety Team
Amazon.com
www.amazon.com
Please note: this e-mail was sent from a notification-only address that cannot accept incoming e-mail. Please do not reply to this message.
Affected Product(s):
B0FF25H5JS
Was this email helpful?
 https://sellercentral.amazon.com/gp/satisfaction/survey-form.html?ie=UTF8&HMDName=NotificationBusEmailHMD&customAttribute1Value=RESTRICTED_LISTING_PRODUCTS_REMOVAL_REQUEST
SPC-USAmazon-1618483311667927
Action required: Your listings have been deactivated
时间分组：older 邮箱：account_4 发件人：Amazon Services <donotreply@amazon.com> 日期：Fri, 13 Mar 2026 14:09:01 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:00:40
展开查看邮件预览 
96
Dear seller,
We have deactivated the listings shown at the bottom of this email.
 Why is this happening?
We have taken this measure because we suspect your listing for this product infringes on the intellectual property of others. The listing of this product uses the protected copyright image of a rights owner on its product detail page. We have not been able to confirm that you are authorized to use this copyrighted image on the product detail page. Unauthorized use of copyright image is likely to cause confusion as to the source, endorsement, or affiliation of the goods. Infringement of copyright is a violation of Amazon’s Intellectual Property Policy .
 How to address the listing violation?
To address your listing violation, click ‘Resolve’ next to each affected ASIN in the Suspected Intellectual Property Violations section of your Account Health page . The violation, along with the name of the brand that owns the copyright image can be found under the “Reason” column on the Product Policy Compliance page.
To successfully appeal, you will need to submit the listing to Amazon for review after performing one of the following actions:
1. If the product is manufactured by the bra

Submit product safety documentation to reactivate listings
时间分组：older 邮箱：account_3 发件人：Amazon Services <donotreply@amazon.com> 日期：Fri, 13 Mar 2026 12:08:48 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:00:10
展开查看邮件预览 
96
 Hello Weihai US,
 Some of your listings have been deactivated due to missing mandatory compliance requirements for your products. Review the details and next steps below. The affected listings are shown at the end of this email.
 Why is this happening?
 We are taking this action because these products are missing mandatory compliance information. Review our Product safety and compliance help page for information on applicable laws, regulations, and Amazon policies. We leveraged a combination of automated means and expert human review to identify this issue and make this decision.
 The table at the end of this email provides product-specific compliance requirements.
 How do I reactivate my listings?
 To provide the required compliance information, go to your Account Health page and locate the product compliance requests:
-
 If you have the required documentation, follow the instructions to submit your compliance documents. We will only reinstate products that fulfill the compliance requirements.
-
 If you believe your products are exempt from these requirements, submit documentation demonstrating why they are not subject to these compliance requirements.
 For step-by-step instru
RE:[CASE 11569978862] 【需立即行动】请通过亚马逊认可的TIC服务商完成儿童玩具合规
时间分组：older 邮箱：account_3 发件人："pc-eu-sesu-seller-compliance@amazon.com" <pc-eu-sesu-seller-compliance@amazon.com> 日期：Fri, 13 Mar 2026 09:36:41 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:00:10
展开查看邮件预览 
尊敬的卖家：
我们紧急通知您，您部分在【欧洲】各站点的部分【儿童玩具】商品尚未完成合规，即将面临下架风险。为避免下架，请在截止日期之前完成以下操作，并确保TRF状态更新为【正在验证】。
① 提交TRF（务必在确认好合作的TIC或进行第二步之前完成，并确保TRF ID成功生成）
• 登录卖家平台，进入【绩效 > 账户状况 > 食品和商品安全问题】，找到需处理ASIN
• 点击右侧【提交】，选定TIC服务提供商后点击【继续】提交TRF，完成可在页面查看TRF ID。
② 向TIC服务提供商支付费用；
③ 向TIC服务提供商寄送产品样品或提交您已有的外部检测报告或合规文件。
④ 确保TIC服务商将TRF状态更新为【正在验证】
如何查看TRF状态：在绩效 > 账户状况 > 食品和商品安全问题找到ASIN，点击右方“提交，查看或更新”>“验证您的商品”
⚠️请注意：
① 同一ASIN可能只在部分欧洲站点被触发通知，若您计划在欧洲（英国及欧盟）继续销售，只需为每个ASIN任选一个站点完成合规，测试结果将同步至全欧站点。
② 由于数据可能存在延迟，请务必以卖家平台【绩效 > 账户状况 > 食品和商品安全问题】页面显示的最新状态为准。
③ 如果您认为您的产品不属于【儿童玩具】产品，请选择【申诉请求】选项，提供您认为产品被错误识别的原因进行申诉。
感谢您的支持，祝您合规大卖
如有疑问，请扫码加入亚马逊卖家合规群：
https://m.media-amazon.com/images/G/01/CN_Compliance_Team/mass_wecom_yt.jpg
Amazon Global Selling Seller Compliance Team

时间分组：older 邮箱：account_4 发件人："pars-rp-core-sellerappeals-hvl@amazon.com.au" <pars-rp-core-sellerappeals-hvl@amazon.com.au> 日期：Fri, 13 Mar 2026 05:17:27 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:00:40
展开查看邮件预览 
Hello,
We received your submission and after careful review we have determined that your ASINs do not meet the criteria for reinstatement.
Why did this happen?
Your listings do not meet our standards. Refer to the following details:
ASIN: B0FBL3FD87 B0FBL2NZ14 B0F74J7N8D B0DSB3S7L2 B0DSB5BPVM B0F74DV4WN
This product has been identified as a small, high-powered magnet or magnet set, which is prohibited for sale in the Amazon Australia store. Please refer to our Restricted Products Help Page for more information: <a href="https://sellercentral.amazon.com.au/gp/help/help.html?itemID=200164570&referral=A2I0XMG9K8TMUE_A3T8UMQ0A1559X">https://sellercentral.amazon.com.au/gp/help/help.html?itemID=200164570&referral=A2I0XMG9K8TMUE_A3T8UMQ0A1559X</a>
You can access the previous communication sent to you in regards to this matter via the "Performance notifications" page in the "Performance" section of Seller Central:
https://sellercentral.amazon.com.au/gp/customer-experience/perf-notifications.html
We're here to help
For information on our policies, you can go to the following pages:
-- "Restricted products":
https://sellercentral.amazon.com.au/gp/help/200164330?referral=A2I0XMG9K8TMUE_A3T8UM
RE:[CASE 11569643882] 【需立即行动】请通过亚马逊认可的TIC服务商完成儿童玩具合规
时间分组：older 邮箱：account_1 发件人："pc-eu-sesu-seller-compliance@amazon.com" <pc-eu-sesu-seller-compliance@amazon.com> 日期：Fri, 13 Mar 2026 04:21:47 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:01:17
展开查看邮件预览 
尊敬的卖家：
我们紧急通知您，您部分在【欧洲】各站点的部分【儿童玩具】商品尚未完成合规，即将面临下架风险。为避免下架，请在截止日期之前完成以下操作，并确保TRF状态更新为【正在验证】。
① 提交TRF（务必在确认好合作的TIC或进行第二步之前完成，并确保TRF ID成功生成）
• 登录卖家平台，进入【绩效 > 账户状况 > 食品和商品安全问题】，找到需处理ASIN
• 点击右侧【提交】，选定TIC服务提供商后点击【继续】提交TRF，完成可在页面查看TRF ID。
② 向TIC服务提供商支付费用；
③ 向TIC服务提供商寄送产品样品或提交您已有的外部检测报告或合规文件。
④ 确保TIC服务商将TRF状态更新为【正在验证】
如何查看TRF状态：在绩效 > 账户状况 > 食品和商品安全问题找到ASIN，点击右方“提交，查看或更新”>“验证您的商品”
⚠️请注意：
① 同一ASIN可能只在部分欧洲站点被触发通知，若您计划在欧洲（英国及欧盟）继续销售，只需为每个ASIN任选一个站点完成合规，测试结果将同步至全欧站点。
② 由于数据可能存在延迟，请务必以卖家平台【绩效 > 账户状况 > 食品和商品安全问题】页面显示的最新状态为准。
③ 如果您认为您的产品不属于【儿童玩具】产品，请选择【申诉请求】选项，提供您认为产品被错误识别的原因进行申诉。
感谢您的支持，祝您合规大卖
如有疑问，请扫码加入亚马逊卖家合规群：
https://m.media-amazon.com/images/G/01/CN_Compliance_Team/mass_wecom_sw.jpg
Amazon Global Selling Seller Compliance Team

[Case ID:12212259122]"Your Help Needed" NL - Food and Product Safety - ASIN: B0DSB4L5QS
时间分组：older 邮箱：account_4 发件人："no-reply@amazon.nl" <no-reply@amazon.nl> 日期：Fri, 13 Mar 2026 00:23:24 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:00:40
展开查看邮件预览 
Dit is om je er aan te herinneren dat we meer informatie nodig hebben om je case op te lossen. Als je nog steeds hulp nodig hebt, reageer dan op dit bericht en verstrek de gegevens die we hieronder hebben aangevraagd.
Als we je probleem hebben opgelost, is er geen verdere actie nodig en sluiten we je case.
Amazon-ondersteuning
-- Original Message --
Hello from Amazon Selling Partner Support!
We've completed our review of your ASIN B0DSB4L5QS appeal that your selling privileges need to be restored due to product safety issues.
After review, we have successfully reinstated your ASIN B0DSB4L5QS selling privileges in the following markets: DE (Germany), FR (France), ES (Spain), IE (Ireland), UK (UK), and MEA and TR markets.
If you wish to resume selling privileges in the NL (Netherlands), PL (Poland), SE (Sweden), BE (Belgium), and IT (Italy) markets, please provide an age warning mark (product or packaging image showing mandatory marking: age warning in the language of the appropriate country) that compliant the requirements of the target sales country.
Please note that all documents must be submitted in PDF or ZIP format.
Thank you for your cooperation.
To help us continually improve

收到更新信息后,请注意,您提供的文件不足以恢复。

时间分组：older 邮箱：account_2 发件人：Amazon Services <donotreply@amazon.com> 日期：Thu, 12 Mar 2026 09:09:30 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:01:47
展开查看邮件预览 
96
 Hello Bailian Direct,
 Some of your listings have been deactivated due to missing mandatory compliance requirements for your products. Review the details and next steps below. The affected listings are shown at the end of this email.
 Why is this happening?
 We are taking this action because these products are missing mandatory compliance information. Review our Product safety and compliance help page for information on applicable laws, regulations, and Amazon policies. We leveraged a combination of automated means and expert human review to identify this issue and make this decision.
 The table at the end of this email provides product-specific compliance requirements.
 How do I reactivate my listings?
 To provide the required compliance information, go to your Account Health page and locate the product compliance requests:
-
 If you have the required documentation, follow the instructions to submit your compliance documents. We will only reinstate products that fulfill the compliance requirements.
-
 If you believe your products are exempt from these requirements, submit documentation demonstrating why they are not subject to these compliance requirements.
 For step-by-step i

 Hello ONLYFUN UK,
 Some of your listings are at risk of deactivation due to missing mandatory compliance requirements for your products. Review the details and next steps below. The affected listings are shown at the end of this email.
 Why is this happening?
 We are taking this action because these products are missing mandatory compliance information. Review our Product safety and compliance help page for information on applicable laws, regulations, and Amazon policies.
 The table at the end of this email provides product-specific compliance requirements.
 How do I reactivate my listings?
 To provide the required compliance information, go to your Account Health page and locate the product compliance requests:

-

RE:[CASE 12203982982] DE - Food and Product Safety - ASIN: B0DSB4L5QS
时间分组：older 邮箱：account_4 发件人：Amazon Seller Support <merch.service05@amazon.de> 日期：Thu, 12 Mar 2026 03:11:56 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:00:42
展开查看邮件预览 
Hello from Amazon Selling Partner Support,
I understand your query regarding ASIN B0DSB4L5QS (Magnetic Blocks, Model T083, brand Crifeton).
We have completed our review of the product safety documentation you provided. The product safety violation has been resolved, and your ASIN will be reinstated. You may relist the product. Please note that reinstatement may take 1 to 2 business days to complete.
However, we have identified that this ASIN currently has a separate compliance issue that requires your attention. There is an outstanding violation related to EPR: German WEEE - Small equipment that must be addressed. You can view the details and submit the required information by visiting your Account Health page in Seller Central at https://sellercentral-europe.amazon.com/performance/account/health/product-policies?t=&s=B0DSB4L5QS
Please submit the necessary WEEE compliance documentation to resolve this separate issue and ensure your listing remains active.
To help us continually improve, we ask that you take a moment to complete our survey below to tell us about your experience with this specific interaction.
Were you satisfied with the support provided?
Click here for yes:
https://

平素はAmazon.co.jp をご利用いただき、ありがとうございます。
お問い合わせいただいた商品は当審査の対象外のため、販売継続とさせていただいております。特に追加の対応は必要ございません。
なお今後審査の対象になります場合には、別途ご連絡いたします。
Amazonでは販売パートナーの皆様とのコミュニケーションの質を向上させるため、1分ほどのアンケートへの協力をお願いしています。ぜひご回答をお願いいたします。

Action required: Your listings have been deactivated
时间分组：older 邮箱：account_4 发件人：Amazon Services <donotreply@amazon.com> 日期：Wed, 11 Mar 2026 13:07:41 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:00:44
展开查看邮件预览 
96
Dear seller,
We have deactivated the listings shown at the bottom of this email.
 Why is this happening?
We have taken this measure because we suspect your listing for this product infringes on the intellectual property of others. The listing of this product uses the protected copyright image of a rights owner on its product detail page. We have not been able to confirm that you are authorized to use this copyrighted image on the product detail page. Unauthorized use of copyright image is likely to cause confusion as to the source, endorsement or affiliation of the goods. Infringement of copyright is a violation of Amazon’s Intellectual Property Policy .
 How to address the listing violation?
To address your listing violation, click “Resolve” next to each affected ASIN in the Suspected Intellectual Property Violations section of your Account Health page . The violation, along with the name of the brand that owns the copyright image can be found under the “Reason” column on the Product Policy Compliance page.
To successfully appeal, you will need to submit the listing to Amazon for review after performing one of the following actions:
1. If the product is manufactured by the bran

Unterlagen zur Produktsicherheit übermitteln, um Angebote wieder zu aktivieren
时间分组：older 邮箱：account_2 发件人：Amazon EU <donotreply@amazon.com> 日期：Wed, 11 Mar 2026 09:19:39 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:01:48
展开查看邮件预览 
96
 Guten Tag Bailian Direct!
 Einige Ihrer Angebote wurden deaktiviert, da erforderliche Compliance-Informationen für Ihre Produkte fehlen. Überprüfen Sie die unten genannten Details und weiteren Anweisungen. Die betroffenen Angebote werden am Ende dieser E-Mail angezeigt.
 Warum ist das so?
 Wir ergreifen diese Maßnahme, da für diese Produkts erforderliche Informationen zur Compliance fehlen. Auf unserer Hilfeseite zur Produktsicherheit und Compliance finden Sie Informationen zu geltenden Gesetzen und Vorschriften sowie den Richtlinien von Amazon. Diese Entscheidung wurde durch eine Kombination aus automatisierten Methoden und Sachverständigenprüfung getroffen.
 Die Tabelle am Ende dieser E-Mail enthält produktspezifische Compliance-Anforderungen.
 Wie kann ich meine Angebote wieder aktivieren?
 Zum Bereitstellen der erforderlichen Informationen zur Einhaltung von Regeln gehen Sie zur Seite Verkäuferleistung , um die Anforderungen zur Produkt-Compliance einzusehen:
-
 Wenn Sie über die erforderlichen Unterlagen verfügen, befolgen Sie die Anweisungen, um Ihre Compliance-Dokumente einzureichen. Wir werden nur die Angebote für Produkte wiederherstellen, die die Compliance-Anforderun
Submit product safety documentation to reactivate listings
时间分组：older 邮箱：account_2 发件人：Amazon Services <donotreply@amazon.com> 日期：Wed, 11 Mar 2026 09:11:16 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:01:49
展开查看邮件预览 
96
 Hello Bailian direct,
 Some of your listings have been deactivated due to missing mandatory compliance requirements for your products. Review the details and next steps below. The affected listings are shown at the end of this email.
 Why is this happening?
 We are taking this action because these products are missing mandatory compliance information. Review our Product safety and compliance help page for information on applicable laws, regulations and Amazon policies. We leveraged a combination of automated means and expert human review to identify this issue and make this decision.
 The table at the end of this email provides product-specific compliance requirements.
 How do I reactivate my listing?
 To provide the required compliance information, go to your Account Health page and locate the product compliance requests:
-
 If you have the required documentation, follow the instructions to submit your compliance documents. We will only reinstate products that fulfil the compliance requirements.
-
 If you believe that your products are exempt from these requirements, submit documentation demonstrating why they are not subject to these compliance requirements.
 For step-by-step
Rispondi ai requisiti di conformità per le tue offerte
时间分组：older 邮箱：account_1 发件人："Notifiche di Amazon Seller Central (non rispondere)" <donotreply@amazon.com> 日期：Wed, 11 Mar 2026 07:45:11 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:01:18
展开查看邮件预览 
96
Azione richiesta: Informazioni importanti sulle sue offerte
 La contattiamo perché ha pubblicato offerte di prodotti che richiedono l'invio di documenti di conformità.
 Le offerte dei prodotti sono prive dei documenti di conformità obbligatori
 Buongiorno,
 ti contattiamo perché hai pubblicato offerte di prodotti che richiedono l'invio di documenti di conformità. Clicca su Visualizza requisiti di conformità qui sotto per accedere all'elenco dei prodotti interessati e inviare i documenti di conformità richiesti. Se non invierai i documenti entro il termine indicato per ciascun prodotto, le offerte di tali prodotti potrebbero essere rimosse.
 Visualizza requisiti di conformità
 La tabella seguente contiene un campione delle offerte interessate. Clicca su Visualizza requisiti di conformità per accedere all'elenco completo.
 SKU ASIN Stato delle offerte JC-HHBZ0519 B0F914ZQ93 A rischio di rimozione JC-HHMKB0517 B0F914ZQ93 A rischio di rimozione
 Perché succede questo?
L'aderenza ai requisiti contribuisce a garantire che i prodotti siano conformi alle leggi locali e non rappresentino un rischio per i clienti.
 Come faccio a continuare a vendere i prodotti interessati?
Clicca su Visua
Hantera efterlevnadskrav för dina produktposter
时间分组：older 邮箱：account_1 发件人：Aviseringar från Amazon Seller Central (svara inte) <donotreply@amazon.com> 日期：Wed, 11 Mar 2026 07:45:10 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:01:18
展开查看邮件预览 
96
Åtgärd krävs: Viktig information angående dina produktposter
 Vi kontaktar dig eftersom du har publicerat produkter som du måste skicka in dokument om överensstämmelse för.
 Produktposterna saknar dokument om överensstämmelse
 Hej!
 Vi kontaktar dig eftersom du har publicerat produkter för vilka du måste skicka in dokument om överensstämmelse. Klicka på Granska krav på överensstämmelse nedan om du vill visa listan med berörda produkter och skicka sedan in de dokument om överensstämmelse som krävs. Om du inte skickar in dokumenten senast det angivna förfallodatumet för respektive produkt i den här länken, så kan vi komma att ta bort de berörda produktposterna.
 Visa krav på överensstämmelse
 I tabellen nedan visas en av dina berörda produktposter som exempel. Klicka på Granska krav på överensstämmelse om du vill se alla dina berörda produktposter.
 SKU ASIN Status JC-HHBZ0519 B0F914ZQ93 Riskerar borttagning JC-HHMKB0517 B0F914ZQ93 Riskerar borttagning
 Varför händer det här?
Det här kravet hjälper till att säkerställa att produkterna är säkra för kunderna och överensstämmer med lokala lagar.
 Vad behöver jag göra om jag vill fortsätta att sälja de här produkterna?
Klicka på Grans
Vereisten voor naleving van je productvermeldingen aanpakken
时间分组：older 邮箱：account_1 发件人："Amazon Seller Central-meldingen (niet beantwoorden)" <donotreply@amazon.com> 日期：Wed, 11 Mar 2026 07:45:03 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:01:19
展开查看邮件预览 
96
Actie vereist: Belangrijke informatie over je productvermeldingen
 We nemen contact met je op omdat je producten hebt vermeld waarvoor je nalevingsdocumenten moet indienen.
 Productvermeldingen ontbreken vereiste nalevingsdocumenten
 Hallo,
 We nemen contact met je op omdat je producten hebt vermeld waarvoor je nalevingsdocumenten moet indienen. Klik hieronder op Nalevingsvereisten bekijken om de lijst met betrokken producten te bekijken en de vereiste nalevingsdocumenten in te dienen. Als de documenten nog niet zijn ingediend op de vervaldatum die voor elk product in deze link is aangegeven, kunnen we de betreffende productvermeldingen verwijderen.
 Nalevingsvereisten bekijken
 In de onderstaande tabel zie je een voorbeeld van je betrokken productvermeldingen. Klik op Nalevingsvereisten bekijken om al je betrokken productvermeldingen weer te geven.
 SKU ASIN Status van productvermelding JC-HHMKB0517 B0F914ZQ93 Risico van verwijdering JC-HHBZ0519 B0F914ZQ93 Risico van verwijdering
 Waarom gebeurt dit?
Met deze vereiste zorgen we ervoor dat producten voldoen aan de lokale wetgeving en veilig zijn voor klanten.
 Hoe kan ik de betrokken producten blijven verkopen?
Klik op Nalevings
RE:[CASE 12212259122] NL - Food and Product Safety - ASIN: B0DSB4L5QS
时间分组：older 邮箱：account_4 发件人："no-reply@amazon.nl" <no-reply@amazon.nl> 日期：Tue, 10 Mar 2026 14:11:37 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:00:45
展开查看邮件预览 
尊敬的卖家/供应商：您好！
关于您ASIN B0DSB4L5QS因商品安全问题被移除需要恢复销售权限的申诉，我们已经审核了您提交的文件。
经过审核，我们发现您提供的文件尚不足以恢复该商品的销售权限。根据荷兰市场的恢复要求，我们仍需要您提供以下缺失的文件：
- 翻译成荷兰语的产品使用说明书（Instructions for use translated into Dutch for NL market）
请注意，所有文件必须以PDF或ZIP格式提交。
请您补充提供上述缺失的文件，以便我们继续处理您的申诉请求。您可以通过回复此案件来提交所需文件。
感谢您的配合。
To help us continually improve, we ask that you take a moment to complete our survey below to tell us about your experience with this specific interaction.
Were you satisfied with the support provided?

Submit UK import details by 08/05/2026 to avoid shipping restrictions
时间分组：older 邮箱：account_4 发件人：Amazon Services <donotreply@amazon.com> 日期：Tue, 10 Mar 2026 11:22:29 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:00:45
展开查看邮件预览 
96
 Submit UK import details by 08/05/2026 to avoid shipping restrictions
 Hello Xiangyuexin,
 Your Amazon.co.uk seller account requires Import Entry Numbers (IENs) for shipments to UK fulfilment centres. You must provide these details by 08/05/2026 to continue creating new UK shipments.
 Why is this happening?
 We are taking this action because we identified shipments to Amazon UK fulfilment centres without valid Import Entry Numbers (IENs). UK Customs authorities assign these IENs when goods are imported into the UK. As the seller, you must obtain these numbers from your customs declarant, logistics agent or freight forwarder to maintain UK shipping compliance .
 Where do I enter my Import Entry Numbers (IEN)?
 To enter the IENs for your applicable shipments:
- Go to your Shipping Queue and identify shipments received in Amazon UK FCs.
- Under “Status”, click the “Import details” text. It will open a pop-up, where you can enter the IENs corresponding to the relevant shipment. You must provide a valid IEN.
- Save your IEN entry.
 If you would need to update your IEN, you can follow the above steps again.
 What happens if I don’t submit these details?
 You have 60 days after first

审查您的问题详情后,我们彻底调查了您的 ASIN,发现我们的专家团队进行了调查。 如我们可以检查,对于恢复ASIN,我们仍缺失:

相关文件必须以 PDF/ZIP 格式提交。
请执行这一额外步骤，并向我们提供所有需要的信息，这样我们可以确保针对您的咨询提供正确的解决方案。

Unterlagen zur Produktsicherheit übermitteln, um Angebote wieder zu aktivieren
时间分组：older 邮箱：account_2 发件人：Amazon EU <donotreply@amazon.com> 日期：Tue, 10 Mar 2026 09:18:16 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:01:50
展开查看邮件预览 
96
 Guten Tag Bailian Direct!
 Einige Ihrer Angebote wurden deaktiviert, da erforderliche Compliance-Informationen für Ihre Produkte fehlen. Überprüfen Sie die unten genannten Details und weiteren Anweisungen. Die betroffenen Angebote werden am Ende dieser E-Mail angezeigt.
 Warum ist das so?
 Wir ergreifen diese Maßnahme, da für diese Produkts erforderliche Informationen zur Compliance fehlen. Auf unserer Hilfeseite zur Produktsicherheit und Compliance finden Sie Informationen zu geltenden Gesetzen und Vorschriften sowie den Richtlinien von Amazon. Diese Entscheidung wurde durch eine Kombination aus automatisierten Methoden und Sachverständigenprüfung getroffen.
 Die Tabelle am Ende dieser E-Mail enthält produktspezifische Compliance-Anforderungen.
 Wie kann ich meine Angebote wieder aktivieren?
 Zum Bereitstellen der erforderlichen Informationen zur Einhaltung von Regeln gehen Sie zur Seite Verkäuferleistung , um die Anforderungen zur Produkt-Compliance einzusehen:
-
 Wenn Sie über die erforderlichen Unterlagen verfügen, befolgen Sie die Anweisungen, um Ihre Compliance-Dokumente einzureichen. Wir werden nur die Angebote für Produkte wiederherstellen, die die Compliance-Anforderun
Submit product safety documentation to reactivate listings
时间分组：older 邮箱：account_2 发件人：Amazon Services <donotreply@amazon.com> 日期：Tue, 10 Mar 2026 09:09:45 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:01:50
展开查看邮件预览 
96
 Hello Bailian direct,
 Some of your listings have been deactivated due to missing mandatory compliance requirements for your products. Review the details and next steps below. The affected listings are shown at the end of this email.
 Why is this happening?
 We are taking this action because these products are missing mandatory compliance information. Review our Product safety and compliance help page for information on applicable laws, regulations and Amazon policies. We leveraged a combination of automated means and expert human review to identify this issue and make this decision.
 The table at the end of this email provides product-specific compliance requirements.
 How do I reactivate my listing?
 To provide the required compliance information, go to your Account Health page and locate the product compliance requests:
-
 If you have the required documentation, follow the instructions to submit your compliance documents. We will only reinstate products that fulfil the compliance requirements.
-
 If you believe that your products are exempt from these requirements, submit documentation demonstrating why they are not subject to these compliance requirements.
 For step-by-step

Submit UK import details by 07/05/2026 to avoid shipping restrictions
时间分组：older 邮箱：account_4 发件人：Amazon Services <donotreply@amazon.com> 日期：Mon, 9 Mar 2026 11:19:14 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:00:46
展开查看邮件预览 
96
 Submit UK import details by 07/05/2026 to avoid shipping restrictions
 Hello Xiangyuexin,
 Your Amazon.co.uk seller account requires Import Entry Numbers (IENs) for shipments to UK fulfilment centres. You must provide these details by 07/05/2026 to continue creating new UK shipments.
 Why is this happening?
 We are taking this action because we identified shipments to Amazon UK fulfilment centres without valid Import Entry Numbers (IENs). UK Customs authorities assign these IENs when goods are imported into the UK. As the seller, you must obtain these numbers from your customs declarant, logistics agent or freight forwarder to maintain UK shipping compliance .
 Where do I enter my Import Entry Numbers (IEN)?
 To enter the IENs for your applicable shipments:
- Go to your Shipping Queue and identify shipments received in Amazon UK FCs.
- Under “Status”, click the “Import details” text. It will open a pop-up, where you can enter the IENs corresponding to the relevant shipment. You must provide a valid IEN.
- Save your IEN entry.
 If you would need to update your IEN, you can follow the above steps again.
 What happens if I don’t submit these details?
 You have 60 days after first

We appreciate your patience throughout this review process and your commitment to product safety and compliance.

Atentamente,
Amazon Selling Partner Support

=======================================
Do not reply directly to the email you received. It was sent from a notification-only address that cannot accept incoming messages.
Instead, click on the link provided in the email and upload the requested documents:
https://sellercentral-europe.amazon.com/cu/case-dashboard/view-case?caseID=12199431012
If you encounter any issues with the link or submission process you can use the Contact Us form in Seller Central: https://sellercentral-europe.amazon.com/

RE:[CASE 12204071582] IT - Food and Product Safety - ASIN: B0DSB4L5QS
时间分组：older 邮箱：account_4 发件人：Assistenza venditori Amazon <merch.service05@amazon.it> 日期：Sun, 8 Mar 2026 12:29:21 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:00:47
展开查看邮件预览 
Hello from Amazon Selling Partner Support,
I understand your request to reinstate ASIN: B0DSB4L5QS.
We have reviewed the documentation you provided, but unfortunately it is not sufficient for reinstatement at this time. We are still missing the following required information:
Declaration of Conformity:
- Function of the signatory is missing
- First Name/Surname of the signatory is missing
- Signature of the responsible person is missing
- The DoC provided is not complete
Please work with your supplier/manufacturer to provide an updated document. If you have more questions regarding the compliance of your products, some guidance is provided in Seller Central: https://sellercentral-europe.amazon.com/help/hub/reference/GUH6FA4XSJ2LZFLY
Instructions for use:
- Translated versions into each corresponding language according to the country of sales are missing for the requested marketplaces: IT, NL, PL, SE, and BE (if applicable)
All documents must be submitted in PDF or ZIP format.
Please provide the complete documentation so we can continue with the reinstatement review. Once we receive this information, we will proceed with investigating your case further.
Best regards,
Per aiutarci a

RE:[CASE 12203874122] ES - Food and Product Safety - ASIN: B0DSB4L5QS
时间分组：older 邮箱：account_4 发件人："\"Asistencia al Vendedor de Amazon\"" <merch.service05@amazon.es> 日期：Sun, 8 Mar 2026 07:42:42 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:00:47
展开查看邮件预览 
Hello from Amazon Selling Partner Support,
Thank you for your response regarding ASIN B0DSB4L5QS (Magnetic Blocks, Model T083).
We have received your request to reinstate this ASIN across the UK/DE/FR/ES/NL/PL/SE/BE/IT/IE markets. We understand that you have provided TÜV SÜD test reports confirming compliance with EU toy safety standards EN 71-1, EN 71-2, EN 71-3, and the EU Toy Safety Directive 2009/48/EC.
Our specialized team sill be actively investigating your issue.
While we don't have a final resolution yet, please be assured that your case remains a priority.
We will contact you once we receive an update from our internal team regarding the status of your reinstatement request.
Para ayudarnos a mejorar continuamente, te pedimos que dediques unos instantes a completar la siguiente encuesta para contarnos tu experiencia con este caso concreto.

时间分组：older 邮箱：account_4 发件人："Amazon Seller Central Notifications (Do Not Reply)" <donotreply@amazon.com> 日期：Sun, 8 Mar 2026 07:26:33 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:00:47
展开查看邮件预览 
96
 Review shipment defects to avoid reoccurrence
 Hello Xiangyuexin,
 On 2026-03-08, we identified one or more inbound defects while receiving your shipment named """"FBA STA (12/02/2026 09:16)-DTM1"""". The identified defect is """"Missing tracking information (small parcel shipments)"""", which doesn’t comply with the Fulfilment by Amazon (FBA) shipment requirements.
 We have taken the necessary steps to remedy the situation and receive your inventory this time. When we accept inventory that does not meet our shipment requirements or that differs from your shipping plan, you may be charged with inbound defect fees or unplanned service fee for the additional cost required to re-direct, receive and process your shipment.
 Review shipment summary
 Review shipment summary
 Inbound compliance will enable us to receive your shipment more quickly and make your inventory available for sale sooner.
 To view your Inbound Performance over the past 120 days, go to the Inbound Performance Dashboard .
 Thank you,
 The Fulfilment by Amazon team
 Report an issue with this email
 If you have any questions visit: Seller Central
 To change your email preferences visit: Notification Preferences

 Inbound compliance will enable us to receive your shipment more quickly and make your inventory available for sale sooner.

时间分组：older 邮箱：account_1 发件人："Amazon Seller Central Notifications (Do Not Reply)" <donotreply@amazon.com> 日期：Sun, 8 Mar 2026 07:23:14 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:01:20
展开查看邮件预览 
96
 Review shipment defects to avoid reoccurrence
 Hello Alckijy Direct,
 On 2026-03-08, we identified one or more inbound defects while receiving your shipment named """"FBA STA (12/02/2026 12:19)-DTM1"""". The identified defect is """"Missing tracking information (small parcel shipments)"""", which doesn’t comply with the Fulfilment by Amazon (FBA) shipment requirements.
 We have taken the necessary steps to remedy the situation and receive your inventory this time. When we accept inventory that does not meet our shipment requirements or that differs from your shipping plan, you may be charged with inbound defect fees or unplanned service fee for the additional cost required to re-direct, receive and process your shipment.
 Review shipment summary
 Review shipment summary
 Inbound compliance will enable us to receive your shipment more quickly and make your inventory available for sale sooner.
 To view your Inbound Performance over the past 120 days, go to the Inbound Performance Dashboard .
 Thank you,
 The Fulfilment by Amazon team

Hello from Amazon Selling Partner Support,
Thank you for contacting us regarding ASIN B0DSB4L5QS (Magnetic Blocks, Model T083). We understand you are requesting reinstatement of this listing which was removed due to product safety concerns, and you believe there are no safety recall issues with this product.
We have reviewed your case and can confirm that before any reinstatement review can proceed, you must first remove all inventory units from this listing. Our records show there are currently units present in your inventory for this ASIN. The ASIN cannot be reinstated until the inventory count reaches zero for all sellers.
Please create a removal order to remove all units from your FBA inventory. Once all inventory has been removed and the count reaches zero, our Product Safety team will review your reinstatement request along with the documentation you have provided, including your TÜV SÜD test reports and Declaration of Conformity.
You can view your inventory here: https://sellercentral-europe.amazon.com/myinventory/inventory?fulfilledBy=all&page=1&pageSize=25&searchField=all&searchTerm=B0DSB4L5QS&sort=date_created_desc&status=all&ref_=xx_invmgr_favb_xx

关于您商品B0DSB4L5QS的申诉问题，现回复如下：
我们注意到您最新的邮件中没有包含附件。为了继续处理您的申诉，我们需要您提供完整的符合性声明文件（Declaration of Conformity），该文件需要包含以下信息：
- 与产品图片一致的型号（Model Number）
- 签署人的职能（Function of the signatory）
- 签署人的名字/姓氏（First Name/Surname of the signatory）
- 责任人的签名（Signature of the responsible person）
请您回复此邮件并附上更新后的完整文件，文件格式需为PDF或ZIP。我们会将此问题保留一段时间，以便您有时间向我们提供所需文件。如果此案件被关闭，请您点击下方链接创建新案例，系统将自动分配至相应团队为您跟进处理：https://sellercentral-europe.amazon.com/help/center?redirectSource=HelpHub

Submit UK import details by 06/05/2026 to avoid shipping restrictions
时间分组：older 邮箱：account_2 发件人：Amazon Services <donotreply@amazon.com> 日期：Sat, 7 Mar 2026 11:22:05 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:01:51
展开查看邮件预览 
96
 Submit UK import details by 06/05/2026 to avoid shipping restrictions
 Hello Bailian direct,
 Your Amazon.co.uk seller account requires Import Entry Numbers (IENs) for shipments to UK fulfilment centres. You must provide these details by 06/05/2026 to continue creating new UK shipments.
 Why is this happening?
 We are taking this action because we identified shipments to Amazon UK fulfilment centres without valid Import Entry Numbers (IENs). UK Customs authorities assign these IENs when goods are imported into the UK. As the seller, you must obtain these numbers from your customs declarant, logistics agent or freight forwarder to maintain UK shipping compliance .
 Where do I enter my Import Entry Numbers (IEN)?
 To enter the IENs for your applicable shipments:
- Go to your Shipping Queue and identify shipments received in Amazon UK FCs.
- Under “Status”, click the “Import details” text. It will open a pop-up, where you can enter the IENs corresponding to the relevant shipment. You must provide a valid IEN.
- Save your IEN entry.
 If you would need to update your IEN, you can follow the above steps again.
 What happens if I don’t submit these details?
 You have 60 days after fir

After careful review, we have identified that the submitted Declaration of Conformity is incomplete and there is a mismatch in product identifiers across your documentation. To proceed with the reinstatement review, we require the following:
**Declaration of Conformity - Missing Information:**
- Function of the signatory is missing
- First Name/Surname of the signatory is missing
- Signature of the responsible person is missing
The Declaration of Conformity provided is not complete. Please work with your supplier/manufacturer to provide an updated document with all required information.
**Product Identifier Mismatch:**
The product identifier from the Declaration of Conformity/Test Report does not match with the product identifier from the images of the product and packaging. As the compliance documentation is for the same product, we must have the same product identifier in all documents. Please correct this mismatch by sending us the correct documentation.
**Submission Requirements:**
All documents must

-- Original Message --
Hello from Amazon Selling Partner Support,
Thank you for your response regarding ASIN B0DSB4L5QS (Magnetic Blocks, Model T083, brand Crifeton).
I have reviewed the documentation you provided and determined that it does not meet Amazon's requirements for product safety compliance.
Please be informed that specifically, the Declaration of Conformity you submitted is not valid according to our standards.
To reinstate your ASIN, you must provide the following compliant documentation in PDF or ZIP format only:
Declaration of Conformity (DoC) - This document must:
- Be issued by the manufacturer or authorized representative
- Be titled "Declaration of Conformity" or contain a full responsibility statement
- Offer traceability of manufacturer or authorized representative (full business address or other items of tracea
Submit product safety documentation to avoid listing deactivation
时间分组：older 邮箱：account_3 发件人：Amazon Services <donotreply@amazon.com> 日期：Fri, 6 Mar 2026 20:15:20 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:00:13
展开查看邮件预览 
96
 Hello Weihai EU,
 Some of your listings are at risk of deactivation due to missing mandatory compliance requirements for your products. Review the details and next steps below. The affected listings are shown at the end of this email.
 Why is this happening?
 We are taking this action because these products are missing mandatory compliance information. Review our Product safety and compliance help page for information on applicable laws, regulations, and Amazon policies.
 The table at the end of this email provides product-specific compliance requirements.
 How do I reactivate my listings?
 To provide the required compliance information, go to your Account Health page and locate the product compliance requests:
-
 If you have the required documentation, follow the instructions to submit your compliance documents.
-

RE:[CASE 12203982982] DE - Food and Product Safety - ASIN: B0DSB4L5QS
时间分组：older 邮箱：account_4 发件人：Amazon Seller Support <merch.service05@amazon.de> 日期：Fri, 6 Mar 2026 18:10:10 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:00:51
展开查看邮件预览 
Hello from Amazon Selling Partner Support,
Thank you for your response regarding ASIN B0DSB4L5QS (Magnetic Blocks, Model T083, brand Crifeton).
I have reviewed the documentation you provided and determined that it does not meet Amazon's requirements for product safety compliance.
Please be informed that specifically, the Declaration of Conformity you submitted is not valid according to our standards.
To reinstate your ASIN, you must provide the following compliant documentation in PDF or ZIP format only:
Declaration of Conformity (DoC) - This document must:
- Be issued by the manufacturer or authorized representative
- Be titled "Declaration of Conformity" or contain a full responsibility statement
- Offer traceability of manufacturer or authorized representative (full business address or other items of traceability)
- Include identification of product allowing traceability (should match the product identifiers from the labeling, for example model number or product title)
- Include relevant legislation with which the product complies, as well as any harmonized standards
- Contain name and surname of the responsible person
- Contain function of the responsible person
- Contain signa

时间分组：older 邮箱：account_2 发件人：Amazon Services <donotreply@amazon.com> 日期：Fri, 6 Mar 2026 04:09:23 +0000 命中词： 抓取方式：RETR 检测时间：2026-03-28 09:01:54

96
 Hello Bailian Direct,
 Some of your listings have been deactivated due to missing mandatory compliance requirements for your products. Review the details and next steps below. The affected listings are shown at the end of this email.
 Why is this happening?
 We are taking this action because these products are missing mandatory compliance information. Review our Product safety and compliance help page for information on applicable laws, regulations and Amazon policies. We leveraged a combination of automated means and expert human review to identify this issue and make this decision.
 The table at the end of this email provides product-specific compliance requirements.
 How do I reactivate my listings?
 To provide the required compliance information, go to your Account Health page and locate the product compliance requests:
-
 If you have the required documentation, follow the instructions to submit your compliance documents. We will only reinstate products that fulfil the compliance requirements.
-
 If you believe your products are exempt from these requirements, submit documentation demonstrating why they are not subject to these compliance requirements.
 For step-by-step ins

 Guten Tag Li Jianyong!
 Einige ihrer Angebote könnten möglicherweise deaktiviert werden, da erforderliche Compliance-Anforderungen für Ihre Produkte fehlen. Überprüfen Sie die unten genannten Details und weiteren Anweisungen. Die betroffenen Angebote werden am Ende dieser E-Mail angezeigt.
 Warum ist das so?
 Wir ergreifen diese Maßnahme, da für diese Produkts erforderliche Informationen zur Compliance fehlen. Auf unserer Hilfeseite zur Produktsicherheit und Compliance finden Sie Informationen zu geltenden Gesetzen und Vorschriften sowie den Richtlinien von Amazon.
 Die Tabelle am Ende dieser E-Mail enthält produktspezifische Compliance-Anforderungen.
 Wie kann ich meine Angebote wieder aktivieren?
 Zum Bereitstellen der erforderlichen Informationen zur Einhaltung von Regeln gehen Sie zur Seite Verkäuferleistung , um die Anforderungen zur Produkt-Compliance einzusehen:
-
 Wenn Sie über die erforderlichen Unterlagen verfügen, befolgen Sie die Anweisungen, um Ihre Compliance-Dokumente einzureichen.
-
 Wenn Sie der Meinung sind, dass Ihre Produkte von diesen Anforderungen ausgenommen sind, reichen Sie Unterlagen ein, aus denen hervorgeht, warum sie nicht diesen Compliance-Anforder
